Name: Accenture
Description:
Accenture is a leading global professional services company that helps the world’s leading businesses, governments and other organizations build their digital core, optimize their operations, accelerate revenue growth and enhance citizen services—creating tangible value at speed and scale.

We measure our success by the 360° value we create for our clients, each other, our shareholders, partners and communities.

This LinkedIn company page is moderated. When engaging with Accenture, we encourage everyone to:

- Use common courtesy and be respectful of others.
- Create your own original content and avoid content that you know to be fraudulent.
- Never repost someone else's copyrighted work, unless you have permission.
- Never post personal, identifying, or confidential information.

We reserve the right to delete comments or posts we deem to be:

- Profane, obscene, inappropriate, offensive, abusive material.
- Spam, repeated comments and commercial messages and personal advertisements.
- Discriminatory or that contain hateful speech of any kind regarding age, gender, race, religion, nationality, sexual orientation, gender identity or disability.
- Threats; personal attacks; abusive, defamatory, derogatory, or inflammatory language; or stalking or harassment of any individual, entity or organization.
- False, inaccurate, libelous, or otherwise misleading in any way.

McKinsey & Company is a global management consulting firm. We are the trusted advisor to the world's leading businesses, governments, and institutions.

Name: EXL
Description:
Choosing a digital partner is about more than capabilities — it’s about collaboration and character.

Unrealistic overhauls and off-the-shelf products ignore what matters most — your unique needs, culture, goals, and your legacy data and technology environments.

At EXL, our collaboration is built on ongoing listening and learning to adapt our methodologies. We’re your business evolution partner—tailoring solutions that make the most of data to make better business decisions and drive more intelligence into your increasingly digital operations.

Whether your goals are scaling the use of AI and digital, redesign operating models, or driving better and faster decisions, we’re here to partner with you to help you gain—and maintain—competitive advantage with efficient, sustainable models at scale.

Our expertise in transformation, data science, and change management helps make your business more efficient and effective, improve customer relationships and enhance revenue growth. Instead of focusing on multi-year, resource- and time-intensive platform designs or migrations, we look deeper at your entire value chain to integrate strategies with impact.

We use our specialization in analytics, digital interventions, and operations management—alongside deep industry expertise — to deliver solutions that help you outperform the competition.

At EXL, it’s all about outcomes—your outcomes—and delivering success on your terms. Share your goals with us and together, we’ll optimize how you leverage data to drive your business forward.

For more information, visit www.exlservice.com.

Name: European Leadership
Description:
Most people would wrongly say that leadership is vision, courage, credibility, determination or even militarism or politics. We however sincerely believe that leadership is first and foremost about people. It is about leaders releasing people to do what they need to do in the most productive and beneficial way.
European Leadership is therefore a non-political business oriented 3i.  European Leadership is the eighth 3i (Internet Ideas Incubator) 3.0 founded by the Frankfurt based, Basque-Spanish Entrepreneur Jorge Zuazola after the success of Spanish Leadership (launched in 2008 with a focus on network, leadership, time management and financial education) German Leadership (launched in 2010 with similar business lines but with a strong time management focus, a key German skill) American Leadership (launched in 2012 with a focus on all these lines of business plus personal finance) British Leadership (launched in 2014 with a focus on LinkedIn, networking and fund raising), Worldwide Incubators Leadership (launched also in 2014) Spiritual Intelligence Leadership (launched in 2016 as a catalyst for worldwide leadership because SQ is the ultimate leadership) and Frankfurt Business Leadership (launched in January 2017 as Frankfurt is well placed to become the City that reinvents the business world). 
Every single professional/business is welcome to organize networking, leadership and business events with the support of European Leadership. 

Different levels of associations and affiliation will be established i.e. 
1. Associate: Those who complete the basic 12 steps 
2. Leader 2.0: Those who launch their own leadership brand 
3. Entrepreneur 3.0: Those who do business in the economic graph 
4 Business affiliates: Companies which apply the Internet Marketing 3.0 principles 
5. Business Leadership Ambassadors: Individuals /companies who regularly organize business leadership seminars 

Our bootstrapping method is our competitive edge versus the traditional venture capital model.  Our 3is have for quite some time created circa 700 clients who support us.  Therefore we simply want to expand our successful business model to give others the chance to profit from this bootstrapping methodology.

Name: Frontier Economics
Description:
We help companies with their biggest challenges – market strategies, regulatory reviews, competition inquiries.  And we help governments design innovative policies and regulatory systems.

Economics is (nearly) everywhere and the economist’s toolkit is large. Clients are surprised at the breadth of our work. Not just the costs of supply, movements in demand, pricing and competitive dynamics. But we are also experts in finance, statistical modelling, game theory, market research and even the psychological side of economics. And we’ve worked in almost every sector imaginable, from fertilisers and oil rigs to handbags and iPads.

In some sectors, economics is so critical that we’ve also built specialist knowledge. Our powerful tools and sector knowledge are valuable. But we try not to stop there. Making an impact for clients means understanding the issues, whether it’s the commercial reality of the business; what is really driving customer behaviour; or the political context. We are also aware that our clients want clear and simple advice, from people they trust. So we place a lot of emphasis on our communications, and on human relationships. We provide complex analysis but plain language – English, German, French or Spanish.

Our reports are often used in legal proceedings and so our evidential standards are high. We never “write to order”. Our work is respected because we are independent and obsessive about the truth.
We work with clients all over the world and have offices in Berlin, Brussels, Cologne, Dublin, Madrid, London and Paris. Our sister company in Australia works from Sydney and Melbourne.

Testing and validation facility for clean mobility products, components, and subsystems. We also have state-of-the-art Digital Twin facility in collaboration with ARAI, focused on creating a powerhouse of digital twin solutions and testing capabilities within the automotive industry. 

Micelio Community
The Micelio community intends to create a pool of knowledge, resources, and solutions to tackle core issues, pain points, and areas of interest of the entire ecosystem. We also facilitate conversations by bringing all stakeholders together through our annual Global Clean Mobility Summit and also felicitate the green changemakers through the Micelio Mobility Awards.

Micelio Pulse organizes stakeholder workshops and funds research to evangelize the cause of clean mobility and enhance market visibility, acceptance, and adoption of EVs. Our annual report in collaboration with the RMI aims to highlight the latest trends in the clean mobility ecosystem.


If you share our passion for clean mobility, we want to hear from you. Drop us a line at – support@micelio.com

Name: Cedar Management Consulting International
Description:
Cedar is a global strategy consulting, research, & analytics firm with a 35-year track record & clients across multiple industry sectors. Since 1985, our teams have assisted clients in strategy, process innovation, strategic human capital, & business technology, among others, with a strong focus on the Financial Services sector. As a full-suite management consulting firm, Cedar assists clients in an integrated fashion – from strategy formulation to execution & implementation.
The firm’s heritage includes being part of the former US$1bn Renaissance Worldwide, whose leadership included the creators of the Balanced Scorecard – the world’s leading strategy deployment & performance management tool used by global organizations.
Our specialist Financial Services practice serves as the firm’s center of excellence offering innovative advisory, research, & accelerator capabilities to the global Financial Services players, covering all business models.
Cedar’s group unit, UK-headquartered IBS Intelligence (IBSi), is a leading global pure-play financial technology research, news analysis, & advisory firm with clients across the financial services universe. For more than 30 years, IBSi has been the definitive source for independent, in-depth analysis of global financial tech markets. IBSI’s annual Sales League Table (SLT) is the global industry barometer ranking leading banking tech suppliers.
The Cedar-IBSi platform also runs the Cedar-IBSI FinTech Lab, a BankTech/B2B FinTech accelerator - home to 35+ successful FinTechs since 2017 & aims to become the go-to FinTech Lab.
Cedar’s independent Venture Capital fund, announced in 2023, will leverage the strong knowledge & intelligence backbone of Cedar-IBSi’s 30+ year track record in global financial services, tech research & consulting. The $20mn (175 Cr) fund will build a portfolio of 15-20 companies with a strong focus on BankTech & B2B FinTech space, hoping to create value for founders in multiple strategic areas beyond capital.

For more information about our services or employment, visit https://derflan.com.

Name: Accenture Japan
Description:
アクセンチュアは、世界有数のプロフェッショナル サービス企業です。アクセンチュアは、世界をリードするさまざまな組織の中核にデジタル技術を実装することで、組織運営を最適化し、収益を拡大させ、また市民サービスの向上にも貢献するなど、お客様に対して目に見える成果を圧倒的な規模とスピードで創出しています。 

アクセンチュアでは、優れた才能でイノベーションを主導する774,000人もの社員が120カ国以上のお客様に対してサービスを提供しています。 また、テクノロジーが変革の成否を分ける時代において、世界中のエコシステム・パートナーとの緊密な連携を図りつつ、クラウド、データ、AIおよび業界ごとの比類のなき知見、専門知識や、グローバル規模のデリバリー能力を最適に組み合わせてお客様の変革を支えています。

アクセンチュアは、ストラテジー＆コンサルティング、テクノロジー、オペレーションズ、インダストリーX、ソングの領域をまたぐ、幅広いサービス、ソリューションやアセットを活用して成果につなげています。アクセンチュアでは、成功を分かち合う文化や、360度でお客様の価値創造を図ることで、長期にわたる信頼関係を構築しています。またアクセンチュアは、お客様、社員、株主、パートナー企業、社会へ提供している360度での価値創造を、自らの成功の指標としています。

アクセンチュアの詳細は www.accenture.com/us-en を、アクセンチュア株式会社の詳細は www.accenture.com/jp-ja をご覧ください。

54 is a sports and entertainment agency operating across five regions and nine offices: United Kingdom (London), Europe (Sotogrande, Spain), MENA (Riyadh, Saudi Arabia & Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates), APAC (Singapore, Vietnam & Adelaide, Australia) and USA (West Palm Beach, Florida). It works with rights holders, governing bodies, household brands and major investors who share its belief in the power of sport. 54 comprises three service areas each consisting of two divisions: 1. Strategic Advisory (Consultancy and Data & Insights), 2. Asset Optimisation (Operations and Commercial), 3. Activation & Engagement (Events and Marketing). Our pursuit of innovation and excellence has earned us industry-wide recognition. Decimal Point Analytics has been featured in Dun & Bradstreet’s Leading SMEs of India (2022 & 2024), named ISV of the Year by Oracle, and awarded Indian SME of the Year by IFCCI. We’ve also been recognized for Excellence in Innovation by ET Edge, listed among Top 10 Finance Brands by CEO Insights, and honored for our ESG and AI solutions at the Canadian RegTech Awards, Aegis Graham Bell Awards, and the MarkTech Hackathon by IFSCA.

Name: Biz Latin Hub
Description:
Biz Latin Hub, part of the Vistra group, is the leading provider of integrated accounting, legal and recruitment services within Latin America and the Caribbean.  

Since being founded in 2014, the Biz Latin Hub team has built a reputation as being a trusted partner to entrepreneurs and multinationals by understanding clients’ needs and working alongside them to make it easy for them to grow and build their businesses in Latin America.  

Having been acquired by Vistra in November 2025, our fully scalable solutions span Global Payroll and Employment Solutions, Entity Management & Compliance and Tax & Statutory Accounting. 

The combination of Biz Latin Hub’s deep local knowledge and client relationships with Vistra’s global platform, means we can deliver even greater value to our clients offering broader coverage, deeper expertise and seamless service delivery.  

Biz Latin Hub’s experienced team of local and expatriate professionals, assists clients in managing the complexities of the Latin American business environment, removing friction and making it easy for them to operate efficiently and compliantly wherever they are based. 

We have an unparalleled reach across the region, with physical offices in Argentina, Chile, Peru, Bolivia, Uruguay, Paraguay, Brazil, Ecuador, Colombia, Panama, Guatemala, El Salvador, Costa Rica, Nicaragua, Honduras, Mexico, Dominican Republic & Puerto Rico. We are well positioned to help companies to enter and operate within the LATAC market-place, providing services that are reliable, tailored and responsive to meet our clients' needs.  
 
For more information, please visit www.bizlatinhub.com

Name: CSG Government Solutions
Description:
CSG is a national leader in planning, managing and supporting complex projects that modernize the IT and business processes of large government programs. For nearly 30 years, we have applied our expertise, innovation, and results-oriented mindset to government program modernization projects for more than 200 agencies across 50 states and territories. 

We provide multiple service offerings to our clients including Project Management Office, Independent Verification and Validation, Quality Assurance, Organizational Change Management, and Strategy. 

Working at CSG

Clients trust us with their most difficult challenges, so we have to be at the top of our game. And you will be, too. You’ll also find that we keep it in perspective, combining a strong work ethic with an appreciation for a balanced life.

It’s a team atmosphere, where dedicated professionals with complementary talents encourage one another to do their best work in an environment focused on integrity, growth, and excellence. These are just a few of the many reasons that CSG was named one of America’s Best Management Consulting Firms eight years in a row by Forbes (2018-2025) and one of The Top 50 Consulting Firms by The Consulting Report in 2022, 2024, and 2025.

Focused on Professional Development

We’re dedicated to the personal growth of our employees, and have programs that enable you to enhance your skills and pursue your career goals within our company.

Our Professional Development group works with you to develop an individual Professional Development Plan that aligns your goals with the skills we need to deliver the highest quality services to our clients and keep you on the path to a rewarding career.

Our training program, The CSG Way, is focused on continuously developing the skills of our employees and sharing knowledge across our organization. The program includes courses that develop your analytical and management skills; expand your program knowledge; and prepare you for project assignments.

Name: NU Advisory Partners

With 2,000+ searches and deep industry expertise, we deliver high-touch service, unmatched networks, and leadership talent that drives long-term value.

Welcome to the future of search.

Name: Karyarth
Description:
Hiring shouldn’t be painful. Good businesses deserve the right people—fast.

At Karyarth, this simple belief changed the way we approach recruitment. The name “Karyarth” means a vehicle (cart) for meaningful work, and that’s exactly what we aim to build—for both companies and candidates.

Seeing the real problem in Indian hiring, we noticed two major issues:
- Companies often struggle to find the right people, even after weeks of interviews.
- Most candidates (especially freshers) fail interviews—not due to lack of skill, but due to lack of preparation.

Our Two-Part Solution
1. Recruitment Services
We're not merely a CV-sharing platform. Your growth is our goal, and we're creating the talent to make it happen. We focus on solving actual hiring problems:
- We start by understanding your business goals—not just your job descriptions.
- We aim to close roles in 5–7 days, respecting your timelines.
- We maintain full transparency throughout the hiring process.
- We measure success by your business results, not by the number of placements.
- So far, we’ve enabled 1500+ successful hires, with 95% of clients returning to work with us again.

2. Interview Bootcamps for Sales & HR Roles
Too many talented people are getting rejected. We’re working to fix that.
Our bootcamps focus on preparing candidates for real-world Sales and HR interviews—especially in industries like EdTech, FinTech, FMCG, and startups.
- Today, 8 out of 10 candidates fail interviews.
- Our mission is to shift this to a 60%+ success rate through proper training and guidance.

What Makes Karyarth Different
We’re not just filling job roles. We’re creating a stronger talent ecosystem.
- We help candidates grow into professionals.
- We help businesses hire better and faster.
From Lucknow to the world, we're not just recruiting.We're building the future of hiring.
Ready to hire from India's most prepared talent pool?
Reach us at growth@karyarth.com.
For candidates: Apply to our bootcamps at www.karyarth.com

Name: Head Hunter
Description:
Biz, iş dünyasında doğru yetenekleri doğru pozisyonlarla buluşturan lider bir iş gücü yönetimi şirketiyiz. Yüksek potansiyelli adaylar ve dinamik işverenler arasında güçlü bir köprü kurarak, her iki tarafın da uzun vadeli başarıyı yakalamasını sağlıyoruz.

Her sektör ve pozisyon için derinlemesine analizler yaparak, şirketlerin ihtiyaçlarına özel çözümler sunuyoruz. Yılların getirdiği deneyimle, yalnızca teknik bilgiye dayalı değil, aynı zamanda kültürel uyum ve liderlik becerileri gibi stratejik faktörleri de göz önünde bulunduruyoruz. Amacımız, her adayın potansiyelini en üst düzeye çıkarabileceği ve her şirketin hedeflerine ulaşabileceği en doğru eşleşmeleri sağlamak.

İş dünyasında güvene dayalı uzun vadeli ilişkiler kurmayı hedefliyoruz. Profesyonel ağımız, sektör uzmanlıklarımız ve insana değer veren yaklaşımımızla, sizin için doğru adayı bulmak bizim işimiz.

Bizimle çalışarak, organizasyonunuz için en uygun yetenekleri hızlı ve etkili bir şekilde keşfedin.

Name: Taleo Consulting
Description:
Taleo is a global independent management and delivery advisory group.

With offices in Luxembourg, Paris, Brussels, Amsterdam, Geneva, Barcelona, Lisbon, Zurich, and Singapore, Taleo Group provides its customers with tailored and innovative solutions. What makes us special is the combination of a unique blend of industry expertise, top level consultants, best-in-class transformation skills and a unique working culture.

EXPERTISE

Our financial expertise combined with our specialization in risk management, compliance, governance, processes management and financial information systems allow us to deliver best practices as well as tailored and innovative solutions to our clients.

There are five pillars to our activities and interventions:
-	Agile Governance & Project Management,
-	Business & Operations,
-	Processes & Change Management,
-	Digital Transformation & Data Management,
-	Finance, Risk & Compliance.

Taleo advises its customers with the best talents on the market. We select only highly-skilled professionals who become agile members of their organization and help our clients deliver more than the initial expectations.

VALUES

Our three values, Family, Fun and Excellence are at the core of our day-to-day activities and shape the way we interact with both our collaborators and our partners. We strive for excellence and we meet the target!

CSR

As a United Nations Global Compact company, we have committed to putting Human Rights, Labour, Environment and Anticorruption at the core of our strategies and operations. Taleo has been appointed Great Place to Work and is certified Ecovadis since 2020. 

JOBS

We are always on the lookout for talented people to enrich our culture and growing family. If you are a candidate, feel free to apply via our website!

Name: Kruger Corp
Description:
Todo comenzó en 1993 con un beeper y un maletín, un sueño que hoy, más de 30 años después, es una corporación con presencia en más de 20 países. Desarrollamos modelos de negocio innovadores basados en tecnología digital infinita para resolver retos empresariales complejos. Cada proyecto que emprendemos tiene un propósito: transformar,  impulsando vidas.
Creemos firmemente en algo más que la rentabilidad; nos mueve un propósito de triple impacto: Innovación Corporativa (Profit), Valor Ambiental (Planet) y Valor Compartido (People) Es decir, medimos los resultados también con el bienestar que generamos en la sociedad y el medio ambiente. Nuestra cultura se vive con empatía, responsabilidad, alegría, humildad, agilidad e innovación. Estos valores, forjados a lo largo de nuestro viaje y de aprendizaje continuo, son la brújula que guía cada decisión.
Ofrecemos soluciones de transformación exponencial y consultoría tecnológica para potenciar la eficiencia e innovación de las empresas. Hemos desarrollado proyectos en campos que van desde blockchain y open banking hasta la automatización de procesos, e incluso incursionamos en energías renovables, ciberseguridad, educación tecnológica y venture capital. Ya sea implementando plataformas de vanguardia o creando startups desde cero, nuestro objetivo es el mismo: aportar soluciones creativas y efectivas a problemas empresariales complejos.

With over a decade of experience and a reputation for excellence, we pride ourselves on our ability to cater to both start-ups and Fortune 500 companies.

What sets us apart is our laid-back yet results-driven methodology. We take the time to truly listen to our clients' needs, tailoring our recruitment strategies to their unique business objectives. Our success speaks for itself—we have consistently outperformed large recruitment firms by delivering exceptional candidates who align with company culture, vision, and long-term growth strategies.

At Launching Point, we serve as the base camp for companies looking to scale. Whether you're looking to strengthen your leadership team, expand your technical capabilities, or build a world-class salesforce, we are here to help you surpass the competition.

Description:
EMISYS est le fruit du rapprochement, au sein du Groupe ASTEK, de deux sociétés spécialisées dans le management de projet, cumulant plus de 15 ans d’expériences. Cette synergie donne naissance à un acteur de référence dans le pilotage, la structuration et l’optimisation des projets industriels complexes. Avec une équipe de 400 collaborateurs, une méthodologie éprouvée et un réseau de 11 agences en France et en Belgique, EMISYS se positionne comme le centre d’excellence en management de projet du Groupe ASTEK, offrant des solutions adaptées aux enjeux stratégiques des industries.  
 
Un accompagnement à 360°  

L’expertise EMISYS repose sur une gamme de prestations diversifiées, permettant aux industriels de sécuriser, structurer et piloter leurs projets avec efficacité.  

Nous intervenons principalement dans les secteurs d’activité suivants :  

 Transports : Automobile, Ferroviaire et Aéronautique  
 Industrie des Procédés : Chimie, Métallurgie, et Agro-alimentaire 
 Energie, Environnement, BTP et Télécoms  
 Industries Pharmaceutiques & Santé  
 Logistique et le Retail  

 Nos Valeurs, notre ADN  

Notre développement repose sur quatre valeurs fortes : Engagement,  Réactivité,  Proximité et Accompagnement. Elles sont le socle de relations solides et durables avec nos clients et nos collaborateurs, garantissent la pérennité de notre savoir-faire. 

Une ambition forte au sein du Groupe ASTEK  

En tant que centre d’excellence en management de projets industriels au sein du pôle Solutions du Groupe ASTEK, nous fédérons 400 talents en France et à l’international.  
Notre Objectif ? Atteindre les 1000 collaborateurs d’ici 2028 en renforçant notre présence sur le territoire Français et en développant de nouvelles activités à l’International. 

  Envie de relever des défis passionnants ou d’en savoir plus sur nos expertises ? Contactez-nous !

Name: ROI Group
Description:
Performance Strategies realizza eventi e percorsi formativi con i migliori trainers e speakers provenienti da tutto il mondo, perseguendo un modello di eccellenza nella formazione “orientata ai risultati".

Nel solo triennio 2009-2011, hanno preso parte agli eventi e percorsi formativi 3.213 partecipanti provenienti da tutta Italia, consacrando Performance Strategies come leader player nel settore della formazione orientata allo sviluppo personale e ai risultati.

Fondata e guidata da Marcello Mancini, imprenditore e manager con 15 anni di esperienza nella formazione commerciale, Performance Strategies affianca al proprio staff di trainers e product manager i migliori formatori e speakers del mondo, creando con essi delle temporary partnership per la partecipazione ai singoli eventi.

Questo modello organizzativo permette di rinnovare costantemente la proposta formativa offerta ai clienti Performance Strategies.

Grazie alla pluralità dei trainers, eccellenze assolute nel loro campo, e alla varietà dei temi formativi, i partecipanti beneficiano di una visione a 360° sul panorama della formazione e possono costruirsi nel tempo un patrimonio personale di know how e strategie unico e dal valore inestimabile.

Name: Meet & Match
Description:
Depuis 2010, Meet & Match conseille les directions générales et les conseils d’administration des maisons de la Mode et du Luxe dans l’identification, l’évaluation et la sélection des dirigeant·e·s capables de piloter leur performance et leurs transformations.

Positionné sur le segment C-Suite et sur les fonctions de leadership critiques, notre cabinet intervient aux moments clés de la vie des organisations : accélération de croissance, restructuration, transformation retail, renforcement de la gouvernance ou évolution des modèles opérationnels.

Notre expertise repose sur l’analyse des dynamiques sectorielles, la lecture précise des organisations et l’évaluation des leviers de performance.
Notre méthodologie associe recherche ciblée, évaluation comportementale, analyse du leadership et étude du potentiel transformateur. 

Nous nous concentrons sur les dirigeant·e·s capables de :

– piloter des environnements complexes,
– conduire des transformations à fort impact,
– mobiliser les équipes autour d’une vision claire,
– incarner la culture de la maison tout en la faisant évoluer.

Nous cartographions l’ensemble des expertises clés — retail, finance, RH, supply, opérations, digital, merchandising, clienteling, stratégie — pour constituer des viviers de leaders capables de répondre aux enjeux actuels et futurs des maisons.


Notre expertise couvre l’Europe, le Moyen-Orient, l’Asie et l’Amérique du Nord.
Nous intervenons auprès de maisons patrimoniales, de groupes internationaux et d’acteurs en forte croissance, en apportant un éclairage éclairé sur les mutations du secteur, la guerre des talents et les enjeux de compétitivité globale.

Meet & Match crée les conditions pour identifier les dirigeant·e·s capables de transformer les organisations, d’inspirer les équipes et de soutenir une performance durable.

•	eSense is our identity, built into the very name of our company.

About Us
eSense Incorporated is a consulting and services firm founded on the principles of aligning technology with business strategy. We help organizations to thrive in a world shaped by Al. We design intelligent, human-centric Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Agentic AI, Generative Al (GenAl) solutions that deliver measurable practical impact.

Our Mission
To empower organizations to thrive in a world shaped by AI by designing intelligent, human-centric solutions that deliver measurable business impact.

Who We Work With
We proudly serve a wide range of clients, including Fortune 500 companies, government agencies, and emerging innovators across the U.S. We bring agility, reliability, and innovation to every engagement.

Why eSense?
At eSense, we’re passionate about technology—but we’re even more passionate about people. Our human-first approach ensures that AI is used ethically, effectively, and empathetically to solve real-world problems.
Our team combines deep industry knowledge, technical expertise, and a service-oriented mindset to guide clients through every step—from ideation to deployment.
When you work with eSense, you’re not just getting a vendor—you’re getting a partner in transformation.

Name: Senai PR - Tecnologia e Inovação
Description:
O Serviço Nacional de Aprendizagem Industrial (SENAI) possui o maior complexo de Educação Profissional e Tecnológica e de Tecnologia Industrial e Inovação do Paraná, o que o torna referência no apoio ao desenvolvimento da indústria do Estado.

A educação é um dos pilares do Senai, que oferece cursos de iniciação profissional, aprendizagem industrial, qualificação e aperfeiçoamento profissional, cursos técnicos, graduação tecnológica e pós-graduação. A instituição também oferta cursos a distância e in company, atendendo às necessidades específicas dos alunos e da indústria.

O Senai oferece também soluções técnicas e tecnológicas e presta serviços de consultoria, ensaios laboratoriais industriais e apoio tecnológico. A instituição possui a maior rede privada de laboratórios integrados do país e dá apoio para o desenvolvimento da inovação em cooperação com a indústria. 

O Senai possui mais de 40 unidades distribuídas pelo Paraná e mantém Centros Nacionais de Tecnologia nas mais diversas áreas de atuação industrial. 

Missão
Promover a educação profissional e tecnológica, a inovação e a transferência de tecnologias industriais, contribuindo para elevar a competitividade da Indústria Brasileira.

Visão
Visão de Futuro do SENAI 2015: Consolidar-se como o líder nacional em educação profissional e tecnológica e ser reconhecido como indutor da inovação e da transferência de tecnologias para a Indústria Brasileira, atuando com padrão internacional de excelência.

We’re a leading people advisory consultancy that partners with you to source great executives, assess and develop leadership capabilities and expedite change and transformation. 

How do we do this? Through our service lines which can be accessed individually or as an integrated service. From interim management and executive search through to talent intelligence, leadership assessment and development. Everyone here is an expert in their field, which means we can tailor our solutions to any challenge your C-suite is facing. Solutions like finding great leaders. Developing strong talent pipelines. And building high-performing, flexible teams with all the right skills.

Name: Dezan Shira & Associates
Description:
Dezan Shira & Associates is a pan-Asia, multi-disciplinary professional services firm, providing legal, tax and operational advisory to international corporate investors. Operational throughout China, ASEAN, India, and the Middle East, our mission is to guide foreign companies through Asia’s complex regulatory environment and assist them with all aspects of establishing, maintaining and growing their business operations in the region.

With more than 30 years of on-the-ground experience and a large team of lawyers, tax experts and auditors, in addition to researchers and business analysts, we are your partner for growth in Asia. Originally incorporated in Hong Kong in 1992, Dezan Shira & Associates is in its third decade of operations and has subsequently grown to support 35 offices and over 350 staff in our operations throughout China, Hong Kong, India, Singapore, and Vietnam together with our alliance partners in Indonesia, Malaysia, the Philippines, and Thailand. Our firm also maintains client liaison offices in the United States and Europe. 

We are members of the Leading Edge Global Alliance, giving us further access to another 620 offices across another 100 countries. This means we can handle multi-jurisdictional clients as a one-stop-shop. Dezan Shira & Associates also publishes significant and well received business intelligence about each of the markets and disciplines in which it operates through its publishing subsidiary Asia Briefing Ltd. 

Established in 1999, Asia Briefing Ltd. is dedicated to providing individuals and enterprises with the latest business and regulatory news as well as expert commentary relating to conducting business in emerging Asia.

Name: Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes Entreprises
Description:
The Regional Economic Agency guides and supports industrial companies and services to industry businesses at all stages of their development: investment, training and employment, innovation, export, access to funding and European projects, etc.

Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes Entreprises is also in charge of promoting the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region throughout the world and championing its multiple assets to attract new businesses.

rockITdata is a certified Veteran (SDVOSB), Minority, and Woman-owned Small Business that drives transformative change across healthcare, life sciences, and government organizations through innovative, agile solutions that enhance public sector efficiency and elevated human experiences.

Name: ABS Group

La red opera bajo una sola marca en todo el mundo, con únicamente dos miembros: Forvis Mazars LLP en Estados Unidos y Forvis Mazars Group SC, una firma internacional integrada que opera en más de 100 países y territorios. Ambas firmas comparten el compromiso de ofrecer una experiencia al cliente sin igual, prestando servicios de auditoría y assurance, fiscal y de asesoramiento en todo el mundo. Juntos, nuestra visión estratégica se esfuerza por hacer avanzar a nuestros clientes, nuestros profesionales, la industria y nuestras comunidades.

Las entidades de la red Forvis Mazars en España prestan servicios de auditoría & assurance, asesoramiento fiscal, legal, financiero, consultoría, outsourcing y sostenibilidad a través de 800 profesionales en 8 oficinas. 

Forvis Mazars es la marca de la red Forvis Mazars Global (Forvis Mazars Global Limited) y de sus dos miembros independientes: Forvis Mazars LLP en Estados Unidos y Forvis Mazars Group SC.

The Olive Group name has consolidated under Constellis. Please follow Constellis’ LinkedIn page for news and information regarding any of its brands.

Name: Corporate Research and Investigations
Description:
Corporate Research and Investigations Limited is a global provider of investigative research, background screening and business due diligence services for the world’s leading business organisations. As one of the most respected names in global risk management, CRI Group protects the business interests of organisations worldwide. The purpose of our company is to provide the knowledge, systems and solutions that fortify worldwide business integrity and preserve the global marketplace.

Headquartered in London, CRI Group is also located in key regional marketplaces across the Asia Pacific, South Asia, the Middle East, North Africa, Europe and North America. The global presence and technical capabilities ensure that no matter how international your operations are, CRI Group has the network needed to provide you with all the services you require.

OUR MISSION

Safeguard the corporate world by detecting and exposing those elements that can cause irreparable harm to a business.

OUR VISION

•	Stand up against the outside forces that, through corruption, collusion, coercion and fraud, can cause financial, organisational, reputational and legal harm to our global clients,
•	Stand out as the preeminent provider of specialised investigative services that enable our clients to exhibit the highest standards of business integrity, ethics and behaviour.

Name: SgurrEnergy
Description:
SgurrEnergy was originally established in Glasgow, UK in 2002 with an aim to excel in renewable energy consulting. The company with its in-depth expertise progressed exponentially in renewable energy and assessed over 185GW of projects worldwide. Furthermore, with huge growth and expansion, SgurrEnergy was incorporated in 2007 to provide technical advisory and engineering services for renewable projects globally.

Since its inception, SgurrEnergy has become one of the leading reputed renewable engineering consultancy offering 360° services over the complete project lifecycle. Our services are tailor-made to meet the requirements at any stage of the renewable energy project. With a team of more than 220 highly-qualified engineering and renewable expert, we bring a combined 3000 man-years of experience, making SgurrEnergy the largest and only purely renewable energy-focused consulting team across the globe providing feasibility studies, design and detailed engineering, construction management, O&M consulting, performance assessment and technical due diligence services for developers, investors & lenders and EPC contractors.

Vetted by some of the industry’s foremost leaders in utility-scale project development, EPC, investors, and lenders, SgurrEnergy has met the high standards required by organizations like ACWA, Elsewedy Electric, IEA, Brookfield Renewables, Adani Power, ReNew Power, Suzlon, First Solar, Wartsila, Nextracker, IFC and many more. We are actively working on large-scale utility projects in India, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Afghanistan, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Vietnam, Philippines, South Africa, Ukraine, Jordan, Australia, USA, and many more countries; the company is also rapidly expanding to the Far East, Africa, Americas, Middle East, and other Asian countries.

Name: CSR Consulting - Asesoría de Sustentabilidad y Economía Circular
Description:
We are the second-best environmental consultancy firm and one of the top 20 most important consultancies in Mexico, according to Revista Consultoría, as well as the sustainability firm with the largest number of followers in LATAM and the second-largest in Ibero-America

In the Favikon Ranking, CSR Consulting is the best-positioned brand on LinkedIn in the "Hispanic-speaking Agency/Marketing worldwide" category
We have obtained more than 50 awards across 8 countries, making us one of the most awarded sustainability consultancies in Ibero-America

We are the first EcoVadis Approved Training Partner in Latin America and achieved a gold medal in 2023 on this leading platform for supplier ESG evaluation

Since 2020, we have been an ESR (Socially Responsible Company), adhered to the United Nations Global Compact, and became the first carbon-neutral sustainability consultancy in Mexico. In 2024, we were the first SME in Nuevo León to obtain the Environmental Quality Badge from PROFEPA and achieve Carbon Neutral certification

Our main offices are located in Monterrey, and we also have a presence throughout Mexico, Lima (Peru), and Madrid (Spain).

We have developed more than 500 projects in ESG, sustainability, circular economy, CSR, management systems (Quality, Environment, and H&S), energy efficiency, clean energy, and EHS for more than 200 clients
We offer services for the support and implementation of ESG strategies, the preparation of Sustainability Reports (GRI, SASB, IFRS S1 and S2, ESRS, NIS 1 and 2), and responses to questionnaires such as EcoVadis, CDP, ESR, SBTi, SMETA, B Corp, ISO 14001, 45001, and the calculation of carbon footprint scopes 1, 2, and 3

Some of our clients are large multinationals and leading Mexican companies in the automotive, telecommunications, retail, agri-food

We act as advisors on more than 10 national and international chambers
We have participated as speakers on sustainability topics in more than 500 events

Name: Society for Industrial and Organizational Psychology (SIOP)
Description:
The Society for Industrial and Organizational Psychology (SIOP) is an international professional association with an annual membership of more than 9,000 industrial-organizational (I-O) psychologists who study and apply scientific principles to the workplace. I-O psychologists serve as trusted partners to business, offering strategically focused and scientifically rigorous solutions for a number of workplace issues. SIOP’s mission is to enhance human well-being and performance in organizational and work settings by promoting the science, practice, and teaching of I-O psychology. For more information about SIOP, visit www.siop.org.

Name: The Gap Partnership
Description:
We are a global management consultancy specializing in the development of practical and highly effective negotiation solutions and strategies. With offices around the world, we operate in over 50 countries and work with more than 600 organisations. Our team of consultants bring real-world commercial experience from a range of industry sectors, and partner with our clients to provide best-in-class solutions to their negotiation needs. 

We offer negotiation solutions that cover three main areas:

NEGOTIATION CONSULTING: We develop solutions and strategies to support our clients in a wide range of commercial negotiations, including mergers and acquisitions, cost price increases, trade union disputes, stakeholder alignment. We provide specialist input on scoping, planning and preparing, through to supporting them in their live negotiations, implementation and follow-up. 

NEGOTIATION TRAINING: We offer a suite of impactful negotiation development and embedding solutions, from residential workshops through to online learning programs, refresher courses and coaching. Our flagship programme is The Complete Skilled Negotiator, a three-and-a-half day intensive learning journey which delivers enduring behaviour change and measurable ROI. 

DIGITAL SOLUTIONS: The Negotiation Society is a community of negotiators from around the world who have exclusive membership to an online hub offering content that embeds and refreshes their negotiation capability. 

WHAT SECTORS DO WE COVER?
We work with clients across all industry sectors, including FMCG/Consumer, Retail, Oil & Gas, Pharma, Tech and Financial Services. 

WHO DO WE WORK WITH?
Our clients are from a range of roles and disciplines including Procurement, Learning & Development, C-suite and Sales.

Name: ACA Group
Description:
ACA Group is the leading governance, risk, and compliance advisor to the financial services industry. For over 20 years, we’ve been a trusted partner to financial institutions—helping firms reduce risk, fuel growth, and protect their business.

Founded by former regulators, ACA combines deep industry expertise with powerful regulatory technology to transform compliance from a requirement into a strategic advantage. We are the only end-to-end GRC provider that integrates expert advisory, managed services, distribution solutions, and analytics with our ComplianceAlpha platform.

Our global team brings clarity, confidence, and innovation to every engagement—enabling clients to meet evolving regulatory demands and lead with confidence.

We’re proud to deliver trusted AI and technology solutions that help firms streamline and enhance compliance oversight, surveillance, and monitoring. From regulatory change management to marketing reviews, we help firms build smarter, more scalable compliance programs.

For more information, please visit www.acaglobal.com

Name: Ascenturi
Description:
At Ascenturi, we run your sales, accounting, and recruitment so you can run the business. We also help select clients set up international banking and residency options in key jurisdictions worldwide.

We build and manage high-performing remote teams that plug directly into your operations — from outbound sales and appointment setting, to accounting and back-office, to full-cycle recruitment.

For Companies 

We know the right systems and people can change your trajectory.

• Sales & Appointment Setting: Remote outbound teams that book qualified calls and are managed to clear KPIs.
• Accounting & Back Office: Offshore talent to handle bookkeeping, reporting, and operational finance so you stay compliant and in control.
• Recruitment & Talent Pipelines: We source, hire, and manage talent at scale so you always have a strong, reliable bench.
• Global Banking & Residency Setup: Guidance on setting up banking and residency in a variety of countries to support your structure and lifestyle.

We only partner with companies that have (or are ready to build) functional, scalable processes.

For Professionals 

We don’t just place you — we hire you onto our team.

• Join fast-paced teams in sales, recruitment, operations, and accounting support.
• Get coached and trained with scripts, systems, and clear performance standards.
• Grow into leadership and higher-earning roles based on performance, not politics.

If you’re hungry to grow and like clear goals and feedback, Ascenturi is a place to build a long-term career — not just a short-term gig.

 Ready to work with us?

• Companies: Contact us through this page to discuss building your remote team.
• Professionals: Apply through the Sign Up button to be considered for our next openings.

Name: The Alternative Board (Worldwide)
Description:

TAB helps forward-thinking business owners grow their businesses, increase profitability and improve their lives by leveraging local business advisory boards, private business coaching and proprietary strategic services.

You can achieve a consistent and predictable income while serving your TAB members in their own business objectives. 
 
You may be a successful entrepreneur located in a locale which could benefit from the advisory services TAB provides. If so, a TAB Master Franchisee may be right for you.

Name: Devup
Description:
Desideriamo conoscerti a fondo, accompagnarti passo dopo passo nel raggiungimento dei tuo obiettivi perché il valore che tu porti sia significativo, tangibile, capace di durare nel tempo. Goccia dopo goccia, generiamo insieme un oceano di opportunità.

Name: Elevate
Description:
Elevate is a global agency network helping 1,000+ clients worldwide turn followers into devoted fans. Powered by EPIC, our proprietary AI platform, we deliver cutting-edge insights and strategies across sports, entertainment, consumer products, and more to drive fan engagement and growth.
Central to our approach is the synergy between our team’s deep expertise and EPIC, which integrates tools for consumer insights, ticketing, property analytics, and more. This combination empowers clients to maximize ROI, enhance fan engagement, and craft campaigns that inspire lasting loyalty.
Since our founding in 2018, Elevate has partnered with organizations worldwide, delivering results from offices in North America, the Middle East, Europe, Asia, and Australia. Visit us at www.oneelevate.com or follow us @oneelevate_ on Instagram and X to learn more.

Name: Rochester Executive Advisory
Description:
We discover and elevate leaders to advance responsible growth. 
This is all to do with a leadership state of mind, which derives from in-depth ability to read people and organizations, consistently across all that we do.

Rochester was born as an independent Executive Search firm and has evolved into an Executive Advisory company. Founded in London in 1982, working on behalf of a select number of clients on an international basis, we have been operating in Italy since early 2002. 
From a solid reputation within Financial Services, we have progressively expanded our reach to Corporate, Strategy Consulting, Private Equity and their Portfolio Companies. We are generalist today, yet with the strengths of this background, related connections and leadership focus. 

Our Clients recognize us for: a high level of commitment and dedication, an engaging interpersonal style, the ability to identify with client goals, values and expectations, as well as for distinctive results in the light of value creation.

Our Services: 1-Executive Search, 2-Market Intelligence, 3-Executive Assessment and Development, 4-Career Counselling. 

The most recent recognition and distinctive element that differentiates us in the market is the ISO 9001 certification (with DNV). 
Compliance: we have double permanent Ministerial Authorization for Executive Search (2007, prot. nr. RE/13/I/1442) and Outplacement (2014, prot. nr. 39/0000816/MA004.A003).
We are also member of AISO, Associazione Italiana Società di Outplacement.

We create value through people, for people.

Name: GOPA Worldwide Consultants

Location: Bad Homburg vor der Hohe, HE

Name: Purple Quarter
Description:
We are a Bespoke CTO Search Firm with a singular focus on Technology Leadership Search for Tech Product companies globally.

From CTO, CPO, CISO, AI/ML to Data Scientist Heads and Principal Engineers, we specialize in placing senior tech talents who drive success. Whether you're a budding startup or a public enterprise, our partnerships empower your business to soar to new heights. 

Purple Quarter’s Search Mapping = 360-degree Candidate Profiling + Synergy Match (Talent Fitment and Business Needs) 

How do we do it?

Not your average evaluation; we look beyond technical skills and domain expertise. 

Our Unique Talent Mapping = Intelligence Quotient on Technology + Emotional Quotient as a Leader + Behavioural Quotient as an Individual. 

Our Proven Approach:

Our proprietary Behavioral Metrics Model (BMM) assesses personality traits, interpersonal skills, and individual aspirations to ensure a perfect match. 
Our search process includes:

- Ideate a hiring action plan in tandem with stakeholders
- Evaluate prospects using 83+ behavioral metrics
- Deliver a comprehensive report of selected candidates to clients
- Salary negotiation and Onboarding assistance 
- Post-onboarding support for a minimum period of 12 months 

Notable Clientele:

We have successfully matched 200+ tech leaders across domains, partnering with brands such as DP World, Walmart Global Tech, Swiggy, UiPath, Acko, Razorpay, Big Basket, Zeta, Postman, Upstox, Gameskraft, Urban Company, Browserstack, Porter, Lendingkart, and many more.

To hire some of the best talents in the industry, connect with us: interact@purplequarter.com

Name: Extia Ingénierie
Description:
Bienvenue chez Extia Ingénierie !

 1re Great Place To Work de France, nous sommes convaincus que le bien-être au travail génère de la performance économique. L’humain est donc au centre de nos attentions, d’où notre leitmotiv “D’abord Qui, Ensuite Quoi”.  

Née de la scission avec Extia et forts de 18 ans d'expérience, nous accompagnons nos clients du secteur industriel dans leurs projets de transformation. 

Notre ambition : construire avec nos partenaires l’ingénierie de demain, en accord avec nos engagements RSE.

Notre approche personnalisée et innovante du conseil nous permet d’adresser tout le cycle de vie des projets de nos clients, de la phase études jusqu’à la phase travaux, de la conception à la réalisation, tout en garantissant la qualité et la sécurité.

Nous nous appuyons notamment sur notre Bureau d'Études pour répondre aux besoins de nos clients à l'aide de nos 3 offres : l'Offre NDC Structures, l'Offre NDC Electricité & l'Offre GC des Réseaux Télécoms. 

Nous adressons un large panel de secteurs (Energies & Process, Transports & Infrastructures linéaires, Naval/Défense, BTP, Santé, Télécoms, Machines spéciales) tout en prenant en compte les enjeux et les spécificités de chacun.

Entreprise responsable, notre objectif est d’avoir un impact positif sur le monde qui nous entoure en mobilisant différentes parties prenantes autour d’une conviction commune : 
l’ingénierie au service d’un monde durable.

 Au total, ce sont plus de 450 ingénieurs et scientifiques qui interviennent dans 9 agences en Europe : Paris, Lille, Nantes, Lyon, Aix-en-Provence, Toulon, Grenoble, mais aussi Bruxelles (Belgique) et Lausanne (Suisse).    

Si vous aussi souhaitez construire avec nous l’ingénierie de demain, Extia Ingénierie recrute ! Découvrez nos offres & bien plus sur www.extia-ingenierie.com.

Name: Wurzel Consulting
Description:
Wurzel Consulting Group es una firma de consultoría estratégica en Recursos Humanos con presencia global. Actuamos como Growth Partner para empresas que buscan escalar, transformarse y optimizar su capital humano con un enfoque ágil, técnico y alineado a sus objetivos de negocio.

Operamos bajo un modelo Forex 24/7/365, lo que nos permite ofrecer soluciones continuas sin importar la zona horaria o país, acompañando a organizaciones en cualquier momento del año.

Nuestras soluciones se basan en datos, tecnología e inteligencia artificial, generando valor real y medible en cada etapa del ciclo de talento.

¿Qué nos distingue?
	•	Implementación de inteligencia artificial para procesos de talento más rápidos, precisos y eficientes.
	•	Talento plug and play: perfiles listos para adaptarse e impactar desde el primer día.
	•	Enfoque multisectorial: colaboramos con industrias como tecnología, salud, ingeniería, consumo y más.
	•	Acompañamiento estratégico continuo, no solo operativo.
	•	Acceso a unidades especializadas como GCO Recruitment, que ejecutan nuestras estrategias globales de atracción de talento.
	•	Presencia internacional con atención constante, alineada a los retos de un mercado cambiante.

No somos una agencia. Somos aliados en la evolución de tu organización.

Wurzel Consulting Group: talento que transforma.

Name: BMT

Name: KPMG Norway
Description:
KPMG er mest kjent som revisorer, forretningskonsulenter og advokater, men vi er også mye mer. 
Vi vet hva virksomheter har på toppen av sin agenda, derfor har vi bygget ledende fagmiljøer innen områdene som blir viktigst i framtiden: cybersikkerhet, bærekraft, kompetanse og teknologi. 
Fordi våre råd skal lønne seg, og de skal være tilpasset morgendagen, både for kundene våre og for samfunnet. 
Da gjelder det å ligge i forkant. 
Å ligge i forkant er lønnsomt. Det er for eksempel bedre å sikre seg mot cyberangrep enn å rydde opp i etterkant. Vi vet, fordi vi hjelper til både før, under og etter kriser. 
 
Vi vet også at de selskapene som investerer i framtidens teknologi og lykkes med det grønne skiftet, ikke bare er med på å redde klimaet, de er også med på å skape morgendagens arbeidsplasser.
I KPMG våger vi å stille spørsmål, utfordre, vise nysgjerrighet og si ting rett frem. Kun da forstår vi kundenes utfordringer og muligheter fullt ut, og slik blir vi i stand til å gi bedre råd. Råd som ser mot fremtiden. 

Fordi på sikt er det det som lønner seg.

Name: Exponent
Description:
In an era of accelerating change, Exponent is the only premium engineering and scientific consulting firm with the depth and breadth of expertise to solve our clients’ most profoundly unique, unprecedented, and urgent challenges.

Exponent brings together 90+ technical disciplines and 950+ consultants to help our clients navigate the increasing complexity of more than a dozen industries, connecting decades of pioneering work in failure analysis to develop solutions for a safer, healthier, sustainable world.  

Our consultants deliver the highest value by leveraging multidisciplinary expertise and resources from across Exponent's offices in North America, Asia, and Europe. Exponent's consultants, laboratories, databases, and computing resources work seamlessly together around the globe, enabling us to produce the breakthrough insights needed to help multinational companies, startups, law firms, insurance companies, government, and society respond to incidents and push their products and processes forward. 

Exponent is certified to ISO 9001.

Name: Elior Group
Description:
Elior Group, one of the world's leading operators in contract catering and support services, has become a benchmark player in the business & industry, education and healthcare. Operating in 5 countries, Elior Group is a leader in its main markets, in Europe and North America.

Our missions are to earn our guests’ trust, every day, by serving delicious, healthy and eco-friendly meals, and to provide excellent services at the locations of our customers and to those occupying them.

Our ambition is to reinvent our business as a social caterer so that we can respond effectively to three major concerns of our guests:
 Is what I eat healthy and tasty, and is it good for me? 
 Will eating also be a pleasurable opportunity for togetherness, and will it be good for us? 
 Will the impact of what I eat be good for everyone?

Key figures:
 3 million guests per day 
 5 countries
 97,000 employees
 €4,45 billion in revenue 
 20,250 restaurants and points of sale
 2,400 sites managed by Elior Services

Name: Brickendon Consulting
Description:
Brickendon is an award-winning global transformational management and technology consultancy. Our people are intelligent and focused high achievers, with an average of 10+ years’ domain experience.

Who we are
•	We are experts at delivering change in complex, highly regulated environments. 
•	We are specialists in financial services and within the public sector empowering business and IT leaders to rapidly turn strategy into operational reality.
•	Our clients include 30 of the world’s largest financial services organisations, the UK government and market leading fintechs and startups.
•	Founded in 2010 we have generated sales revenue of over $250 million across our global locations generating $1.5 billion in operational value for our clients.

What we do.

•	Managed Services providing fixed capacity or guaranteeing client outcomes. 
•	Global offices across UK, Europe, India and North America enabling the optimum mix of onshore, near shore and offshore teams to deliver more value for our clients sooner.

We have delivered projects in 40 countries, including every EU country, incorporating all the language and cultural challenges into our solutions. We have the expertise and flexible engagement models to scale as required and continue to support you. Our teams can run the entire project along side or independently of your teams to ensure that the delivery goals are rapidly met whilst maintaining the highest quality of output.

Name: Môre

Name: İzgören Akademi
Description:
1996 yılında Ankara’da Academy International Eğitim ve Danışmanlık Şirketi olarak kurulduk. Türkiye’nin tüm illerinde, KKTC ve yurtdışında faaliyet göstermekteyiz. Kuruluşumuzdan bir süre sonra ismimizin Türkçe olmasını istediğimiz için, markamızı İzgören Akademi olarak değiştirdik.

2004’ten bu yana Türkiye Uğur Böcekleri Programı ile gönüllü seminerler vererek ülkemizin dört bir yanında bilgimizi paylaşıyoruz. Gönüllü uğurböceklerimizle beraber toplamda 185.000’den fazla kişiye ulaştık. 

2005 yılından bu yana Vizgo.net Uzaktan Eğitim Sistemimiz ile 7 x 24 dilediğiniz anda, istediğiniz yerde, talep ettiğiniz kadar kişiye, ihtiyacınız olan bilgiyi gerek DVD, gerekse internet üzerinden sunuyoruz. Kurumunuzun ihtiyacı doğrultusunda özel çekim ve projeler gerçekleştiriyoruz. 

2012 yılı itibariyle Genel Merkez Ankara Ofisi ile beraber Bursa, Antalya, Kocaeli, Kayseri Bölge Müdürlüklerimiz ile eğitim ve danışmanlık alanında kurumların ve bireylerin hedefledikleri performansa ulaşmaları için destek veriyoruz.

Hayat Amacımız:
Daha eğitimli ve daha çok okuyan bir ülke için çalışıyoruz.

Gelecek Hayalimiz:
Alanımızda Türkiye’ nin en saygı duyulan kurumu olacağız.

Değerlerimiz:
Dürüstlük
İş Kalitesi
Girişimcilik
Hoşgörü
Yurt Sevgisi

Follow news, photos and video on Twitter at www.twitter.com/avasant, Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/avasantllc, and LinkedIn at https://www.linkedin.com/company/avasant.

Name: Hansen Toft
Description:
Hansen Toft A/S er etableret i 2001 og har i dag kontorer i Aarhus, København og Kolding. Virksomheden ejes af 10 partnere, der alle er aktive i virksomheden. Vi løser opgaver i mange forskellige brancher, primært i Danmark, men også internationalt.
 
Hansen Toft A/S har opnået en markant og synlig position på forretningsområdet Executive Search. I dag deltager Hansen Tofts mere end 40 ansatte i +425 ansættelser årligt, hvoraf 125 er på bestyrelsesposter og stillinger på direktørniveau (CXO) og yderligere 300 er på lederniveau. I disse processer taler vi forretning, ledelse og karriere med flere tusind personer årligt.
 
Vi arbejder også succesfuldt med Leadership Consulting, som bl.a. omfatter Executive Assessment, Executive sparring/coaching og flere områder indenfor ledelses-, strategi- og organisationsudvikling. Vores rolle er her at flytte forretning for vores kunder i tæt samspil med virksomhedens ledere og nøglepersoner.

Name: Imagreen
Description:
Imagreen est une société de conseil, partenaire expert des acteurs publics et privés. Mobilisant une expertise plurielle, Imagreen accompagne ses clients pour agir sur tous les leviers de leur structure, afin de réussir ensemble la transition sociale, environnementale et économique de notre société.

Véritable « prestataire de services » (Service Provider) de la transition, Imagreen accompagne ses partenaires à travers cinq domaines d’expertises et d’action :  

 Énergies et Territoires  
  Talents et Engagement 
 Diagnostic et Mesure   
 Stratégie et Modèle d’affaires  
 Messages et Influence  

L’objectif commun poursuivi : mettre en cohérence les activités humaines avec les limites planétaires. Parmi ces limites, la lutte contre le dérèglement climatique, mère de toutes les batailles, réclame la décarbonation puissante et urgente des économies. 

La conviction d’Imagreen est que pour réussir, il faut fédérer les femmes et les hommes autour d’une transition bienveillante, exigeante et désirable.  

Dans un monde impacté par nos modes de vie, l’humain doit être le moteur et l’accélérateur d’une transformation profonde et nécessaire de nos sociétés. L’idéal porté par Imagreen est de permettre à chacun et chacune de se rendre utile à la transition. 

Officiellement société à mission depuis 2021, Imagreen se donne pour mission les objectifs sociaux et environnementaux suivants :  

1 Accompagner et accélérer la nécessaire transformation du marché de l’emploi autour de trois axes : la formation, la reconversion et l’inclusion  

2 Sensibiliser publiquement l'ensemble des acteurs et le grand public pour les fédérer autour des enjeux de la transition sociale et environnementale  

3 Accompagner les acteurs privés et publics dans leur transition sociale et environnementale vers des modèles toujours plus durables et responsables. 

Sa raison d’être est : « Révéler aux femmes et aux hommes leur pouvoir d’agir. »

Name: Émergences & Talents - Afrique
Description:
Je vous souhaite la bienvenue sur la page entreprise d'Émergences & Talents - Afrique, Conseil en Management & Ressources Humaines et Mentor auprès des Talents dans leur action de Dirigeant, Manager, DRH, Entrepreneur, Professionnel, …

J'ai fondé ce cabinet international indépendant le 1er septembre 2015, fort d' une expérience exclusive de DRH au sein de groupes internationaux anglo-saxons puis français des secteurs d'activité industriel et technique, présents sur tous les continents.

Le Management ne s' enseigne pas mais il peut s' apprendre, j'ai pu le vérifier en DRH global pendant plus de 20 ans au sein des Groupes Valeo puis Bolloré, en stratège éclaireur et en partenaire "global trouble-shooter" au contact et en appui de Managers et Talents dans plus de 100 pays du monde, offensif et pragmatique pour ancrer des cultures d' engagement et d' excellence en environnements stratégiques et opérationnels complexes et turbulents dans un monde plus que jamais "ViCA".

En pays développés et plus encore en pays émergents et tout particulièrement vers et en Afrique où il y a tant à accomplir sans jamais ralentir, il n' est pas de solution de Management prétendument absolue ou universelle, tout est d' abord affaire de la diversité des contextes, des enjeux, des situations, des populations,... et de la pluralité des problématiques spécifiques à chaque entreprise.

Copier-coller n' est assurément pas gérer, les interventions et solutions de Management sur mesure et en mode exclusivement personnalisé font donc peu à peu leur chemin auprès des Dirigeants, il leur faut encore atteindre chacun des Managers et Talents pour les aider efficacement dans l' action en appréhendant leurs singularités, là où l' élan des Equipes et l'engagement des Hommes sont si décisifs.

C'est toute notre singularité de vous épauler personnellement à "Oser, vous Dépasser et Grandir" et faire décoller l'élan de vos Equipes et l'engagement de Talents "Able to leave, Happy to stay".

Description:

Since 2010 we have supported businesses, governments and NGOs through the provision of high quality risk analysis and due diligence services. We do not believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. Instead, our global source network, professional intelligence analysis processes and specialist expertise allows us to produce high-quality, insightful work that has direct relevance to our clients’ business.

We strive to offer clients actionable assessments that go beyond the obvious and offer implications of geopolitical events in the regions they operate.

Our flagship product, the World Risk Register, provides both written and quantifiable analysis on world events, by region. Our proprietary software gives clients the ability to gain any level numerical data on world-wide locations as needed, in tandem with an overall rating system and backed up by written analysis with predictions of how events will unfold and impact business.

Our services and experience include fully-run in-house GSOCs, virtual GSOCs, embedded analysts, consultation and training for existing security operations with insight for improvement, project work, regular reporting, social media monitoring and due diligence services.

As subject matter experts, our analysts are frequently called upon for speaking engagements, media interviews and in-house corporate presentations.

We are always looking over the horizon to keep clients’ personnel, sites, assets and supply chains safe.

Le cabinet a diversifié ses activités au cours des années pour devenir un véritable partenaire diversité & inclusion en proposant un accompagnement 360 qui s’appuie sur 3 expertises :

•	La mesure de la diversité et le diagnostic RH
•	La formation et la sensibilisation aux enjeux de la diversité
•	Le recrutement inclusif de jeunes diplômés, cadres, Middle et Top management

Mozaïk RH démontre qu’une politique d’inclusion professionnelle ambitieuse produit des résultats mesurables et durables : plus de 500 emplois créés, 21 000 contrats signés, 150 000 professionnels accompagnés.
En mobilisant les entreprises, en diversifiant les viviers de recrutement et en agissant à l’interface entre talents et employeurs, nous renforçons à la fois l’efficacité des politiques publiques de l’emploi, la compétitivité économique et la cohésion sociale.

Les inscriptions pour le Sommet de l'inclusion économique des 27 et 28 novembre sont ouvertes, rendez-vous sur www.billetweb.fr/pro/sommetdelinclusioneconomique et toutes les infos sur sommetdelinclusioneconomique.com

Name: Excellance | Gestão de Reestruturação e Turnaround
Description:
Somos uma BOUTIQUE especializada na GESTÃO DA ALTA PERFORMANCE.

Atuamos na REESTRUTURAÇÃO de empresas bem como na RECUPERAÇÃO de negócios (MUNDO DA TREVA - DO CAIXA) que passam por profundas crises de liquidez, fruto da severa perda continuada de rentabilidade, gerando reais riscos de descontinuidade do negócio com elevado risco de efetiva perda patrimonial aos acionistas e seus controladores.

Na outra ponto do espectro do Mundo de Negócios (Mundo da Luz), atuamos no Desenvolvimento de Novos Negócios e/ou na Gestão de Novos Projetos com elevada complexidade e risco, mas que apresentam enorme oportunidade de retorno ao acionista, controlador e investidor.
  
Utilizamo-nos da nossa vasta e comprovada experiência prática para identificar rapidamente as oportunidades de melhoria de gestão do caixa, financeira, estratégica, mercadológica, operacional e organizacional!

Através do nosso modelo de gestão meritocrático baseado na gestão da alta performance, implementamos as melhorias com o máximo de eficiência e no menor intervalo de tempo possível visando maximizar o retorno do capital investido.

Trabalhamos ao longo de todas as fases do ciclo de vida de um Negócio, da reestruturação da dívida, reversão da asfixia do Caixa, revisão da estrutura de capital, retomada da rentabilidade operacional, geração de caixa de operacional e financeira, estruturação de novos negócios (desenvolvimento de Business Plans como um todo), planejamento e estruturação organizacional, montagem dos times de projeto e de gestão, desenvolvimento de parcerias estratégicas e operacionais, liderança in loco da execução de acordo com as métricas estabelecidas no BP validado, chegando à entrega dos resultados objetivados até a perpetuação dos dividendos e/ou efetivação de um M&A.

Temos mais de 35 anos de experiência atuando na Melhoria da Performance, Turnaround e Reestruturação de grandes grupos empresariais - Nacionais e Estrangeiros.

Name: Thymos Energia
Description:
A Thymos Energia foi desenvolvida para ser líder no seguimento de consultoria e gestão de Energia. Com credibilidade nos mercados brasileiro e internacional, possui equipe especializada e atua nas seguintes atividades:

GERENCIAMENTO DE CONTRATOS DE ENERGIA
Gestão independente de portfólio de contratos que visam maximizar ganhos e segurança.

RELACIONAMENTO COM ÓRGÃOS INSTITUCIONAIS
Atuação junto à CCEE, monitorando as obrigações do consumidor livre (verificação das liquidações financeiras, contribuições, aportes de garantias e penalidades).

CONTRATAÇÃO E MIGRAÇÃO
Analisa o perfil da carga elétrica para otimizar a contratação no mercado livre, e avalia a possibilidade e atratividade econômica de migração relativas às unidades cativas.

PROJEÇÃO DAS TARIFAS (ACR E ACL)
Projeção de custos da energia: avaliação de preços do mercado livre e tarifas do mercado cativo, análise e otimização de contratos de compra de energia no mercado livre.

ANÁLISE ECONÔMICO-FINANCEIRA (Assessoria em Leilão, Valuation, M&A, Due Diligence)
Estuda a viabilidade técnica e econômica de empreendimento abordando as incertezas relevantes e aspectos críticos à rentabilidade para definir estratégias empresariais. 

ESTRUTURAÇÃO DE NEGÓCIOS 
Formulação de arranjo societário de acordo com as normas regulatórias vigentes, considerando aspectos tributários e rentabilidade. 

REGRAS E PROCEDIMENTOS DO MERCADO
Acompanhamento das regras da CCEE e ANEEL, relativas à compra e venda de energia e demais aspectos envolvendo a regulação energética nacional.

APOIO TÉCNICO E REGULATÓRIO EM ARBITRAGENS (NACIONAIS E INTERNACIONAIS)
Atua no levantamento do impacto econômico e financeiro da referida arbitragem, especificando os conceitos, formulações e cálculos da matéria, como suporte ao requerente durante processo arbitral.

PROJETOS DE P&D
Desenvolve em conformidade com as diretrizes regulamentadas pela ANEEL e com foco na inovação e dissolução dos desafios técnicos e regulatórios.

Name: Martinelli Auditores
Description:
Fundada em 1973, a MARTINELLI consolidou posição como referência em auditoria e consultoria para empresas de todos os portes e segmentos do mercado nacional.

O sucesso da MARTINELLI é resultado direto do intenso treinamento do nosso corpo técnico, composto por profissionais experientes em diversas especialidades. Esta expertise nos permite oferecer soluções personalizadas que agregam valor aos negócios de todos os clientes.

Valorizamos o relacionamento personalizado em cada atendimento, mantendo proximidade constante durante as etapas de trabalho. Essa abordagem, aliada à agilidade na tomada de decisões, reverbera a alta satisfação e fidelidade dos clientes. 

Além de nossos serviços de auditoria, estamos atentos ao mercado, buscando entender as necessidades atuais. Assim, identificamos oportunidades para contribuir em áreas como gestão, tributos, recursos humanos, tecnologia da informação, ESG, consultoria, entre outras.

Desse modo, a estruturação de trabalhos segue rigorosamente as normas internacionais de auditoria. Além disso, nossas metodologias próprias garantem eficácia técnica e resultados consistentes.

Com sede em Joinville (SC) e escritórios em diversas cidades pelo Brasil, estamos sempre próximos de nossos clientes, proporcionando serviços de excelência. Atualmente, a MARTINELLI ocupa posição de destaque entre as maiores empresas de auditoria do Brasil, mérito do talento e dedicação da nossa equipe.

Name: PT Surveyor Indonesia
Description:
Surveyor Indonesia didirikan pada tanggal 1 Agustus 1991. Pada awalnya misi kami adalah untuk membantu Pemerintah Republik Indonesia dalam memperlancar aliran barang modal dan peralatan ke Indonesia dari seluruh dunia melalui jasa pemeriksaan pra-pengapalan yang bertaraf internasional.

Kini Surveyor Indonesia kian mantap mencapai visi sebagai perusahaan pemberi jaminan kepastian yang tidak memihak dalam setiap transaksi (independent assurance). Pengalaman kami melayani pasar jasa tersebut selama ini menjadi kekuatan utama yang didukung oleh sumber daya manusia yang memiliki pengalaman dan kompetensi yang kuat dalam memberikan pelayanan terbaik bagi para pelanggan kami.

Layanan independent assurance kami fokuskan pada empat sektor yaitu Sektor Migas dan Sistem Pembangkit, Sektor Penguatan Institusi Kelembagaan, Sektor Mineral dan Batubara serta Sektor Infrastruktur. Kegiatan yang kami lakukan mencakup survei, inspeksi, verifikasi/validasi, konsultansi dan sertifikasi.

Melalui pengalaman di berbagai bidang, kami telah membangun pengetahuan luas dalam proses bisnis yang membuat kami mampu memberikan pelayanan yang sesuai dengan kebutuhan khusus dari pengguna jasa.

Kami terus melakukan inovasi jasa-jasa baru dengan dukungan teknologi sehingga memberi nilai tambah kepada pelanggan. Jasa-jasa inovatif ini mempunyai manfaat yang sesuai dan memberi kontribusi yang strategis bagi kepentingan nasional dalam jangka panjang.

Name: Sebrae-MG
Description:
O Serviço Brasileiro de Apoio às Micro e Pequenas Empresas (Sebrae) é uma entidade privada sem fins lucrativos criada em 1972 com a missão de promover a competitividade e o desenvolvimento sustentável dos empreendimentos de micro e pequeno porte. A instituição atua também com foco no fortalecimento do empreendedorismo e na aceleração do processo de formalização da economia por meio de parcerias com os setores público e privado, programas de capacitação, acesso ao crédito e à inovação, estímulo ao associativismo, feiras e rodadas de negócios.

Parte deste esforço ganhou visibilidade com a aprovação da Lei Geral da Micro e Pequena Empresa, em dezembro de 2006. A lei consolidou, em um único documento, o conjunto de estímulos que deve prevalecer para o segmento nas três esferas federal, estadual e municipal da administração pública, inclusive na área tributária.

Um dos dispositivos da Lei Geral, o Simples Federal, já regulamentado, representou grande ganho para micro e pequenas empresas em termos de redução de burocracia, de carga tributária e de custos operacionais. Outro dispositivo, o de Compras Governamentais, beneficiou o segmento por representar um nicho de negócios fundamental ao aumento do faturamento e da competitividade dos pequenos negócios.

Essas ações reforçam o papel do Sebrae como incentivador do empreendedorismo e revelam a importância da formalização para a economia brasileira.  Nosso papel é mostrar aos milhões de micro e pequenos empresários deste País as vantagens de se ter um negócio formal, apontando caminhos e soluções, com o objetivo de facilitar o acesso aos serviços financeiros, à tecnologia e ao mercado, sempre com foco na competitividade empresarial

Tetra Tech Coffey is part of Tetra Tech, a leading provider of consulting and engineering services worldwide. Our specialists are at the forefront of their field in engineering, geotechnical, occupational hygiene, environmental, and project management services.

Across Australia and New Zealand, our operations include over 550 employees located throughout the Pacific. In our region, together we work alongside Tetra Tech Proteus, Eco Logical Australia, Norman Disney & Young and RPS who bring long-established successes delivering practical and sustainable services for our clients.

Our local, national, and international operations work alongside clients to develop their strategies and provide the services they need to take plans forward. From single projects to large-scale programs of work, we deliver against objectives and are adept at working in complicated or highly regulated environments.
We have an excellent breadth and depth of expertise across our teams and can call upon our global colleagues to foster industry-leading approaches. However, we always maintain a personal approach to our client relationships to really under-stand where we can add value to them.

Name: Centric Consulting
Description:
We are an international management consulting firm that brings expertise in AI strategy, cyber risk management, cloud solutions and more.

Founded in 1999 with a remote workforce, Centric has established a reputation for solving its clients’ toughest problems, delivering tailored solutions, and bringing in deeply experienced consultants centered on what’s best for your business. 

In every project, you get a trusted Centric advisor averaging over 15 years of experience and the best talent from across the United States and India. Centric deliberately builds teams that can scale up or down quickly based on client needs, industry and desired outcome. 

Headquartered in Ohio, with 1,400 employees and 14 locations, Centric has been honored over the years with more than 100 awards for its commitment to employees, clients and communities. Most recently, the firm was recognized as one of Forbes Best Management Consulting Firms in America for the 8th consecutive year.

Name: CSRBOX
Description:
For the past decade, CSRBOX has served as a prominent figure in India, fostering collaboration between businesses and the delivery of social impact. CSRBOX collaborates with companies and CSR foundations to design, implement, and assess effective CSR programs. Its three primary verticals—Impact Advisory, Platform, and Programs—comprise a comprehensive approach to corporate social responsibility.
Since 2014, CSRBOX has empowered over 350 companies, aiding them in achieving enhanced Social Return on Investment (SROI) through their CSR initiatives and partnerships with governmental entities.
