Description:
We’re Applus+ Laboratories and we offer world-class product development testing and certification services. 

It all started from our Barcelona HQ but we’ve grown into a global network of laboratories, with teams across Europe, Asia and North America. 

Experts in each of our respective fields, we work from state-of-the-art laboratories to enhance product competitiveness and foster innovation. This means playing key roles in advancing the industries we serve, whether that’s Aerospace, Automotive, Cyber, Electrics and Electronics, Renewable Energies, Construction, Railway, Medical or Pharma.

Up for the challenge? We know our biggest asset is our people, so we’re always on the lookout for those keen to learn and develop with us. Get in touch to advance your career in a diverse and inclusive work environment.

Name: Great Place To Work Middle East
Description:
Great Place to Work is the global authority on workplace culture. Since 1992, they have surveyed more than 100 million employees around the world and used those deep insights to define what makes a great workplace experience. It boils down to trust. 

Great Place to Work helps organizations quantify their culture and produce better business results by creating a high-trust work experience for all employees. Emprising, their culture management platform, empowers leaders with the surveys, real-time reporting, and insights they need to make data-driven people decisions. 

Their unparalleled benchmark data is used to recognize Great Place to Work-Certified companies and the Best Workplaces in the U.S. and more than 60 countries, including those on the 100 Best Companies to Work For and World’s Best lists published annually by Fortune. Everything they do is driven by the mission to build a better world by helping every organization become a Great Place to Work For All.

Name: Protiviti Italia
Description:
Protiviti, parte del gruppo Robert Half, offre a livello globale servizi di consulenza direzionale per aiutare le aziende ad affrontare con fiducia le sfide e i cambiamenti imposti da un contesto in forte evoluzione.

Con oltre 11.000 professionisti e 90 uffici in più di 25 Paesi nel mondo – di cui 550+ dipendenti in Italia distribuiti su 3 uffici (Milano, Roma e Torino) – Protiviti è partner del cambiamento e della trasformazione, grazie ad un approccio che combina la profonda conoscenza dei processi organizzativi aziendali e l’esperienza nella gestione dei rischi e della governance aziendale, con competenze tecniche, tecnologiche e digitali fondamentali per realizzare il cambiamento in modo moderno e innovativo.

Protiviti dispone di tutte le professionalità e competenze consulenziali critiche necessarie per aiutare le aziende ad affrontare sfide, trasformazioni e cambiamenti complessi accelerati anche dall’intelligenza artificiale.

Nominata nella lista Fortune delle 100 migliori aziende per cui lavorare, Protiviti ha ad oggi servito oltre l'80% delle aziende Fortune 100 e quasi l'80% delle aziende Fortune 500. La base clienti include anche PMI e realtà in crescita, comprese quelle che desiderano quotarsi, così come la Pubblica Amministrazione.

 2026 Protiviti Srl

Name: ZoomRx
Description:
ZoomRx is a strategic life sciences consultancy that empowers pharma and biotech companies to achieve clarity in bringing their drugs to market. We combine human expertise with AI innovation, proprietary data assets, and deep life science knowledge to help pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies optimize their market strategies and navigate the future of drug development with confidence. 

With over 15 years of experience, ZoomRx serves as a partner to 19 of the top 20 global biopharma firms, and over 100 firms in total, providing solutions where AI amplifies human insight—transforming complex data into actionable intelligence faster and more effectively than traditional approaches. 

Simply put: ZoomRx helps life science companies' breakthroughs, break through—through the powerful combination of human expertise and AI-enhanced tools.  

What Sets Us Apart 
1) Deep Therapeutic Area Expertise — 15+ years of therapeutic area knowledge across Oncology, Immunology, CNS, Metabolic, Cardiovascular, Vaccines and Rare Diseases 
2) AI-First Innovation — Pioneering responsible AI that amplifies human insights and expert opinions rather than replacing it, from day one 
3) Speed + Depth – From weeks to days, from days to hours—without sacrificing rigor or insight quality 
4) Consultative Partnership – Strategic guidance backed by research execution capabilities, not just data delivery 

 19 of top 20 global pharma partners 
 60k+ HCPs in proprietary panel 
 450+ life sciences consultants globally 
 700M+ benchmark datapoints 
 100% client renewal rate

Name: GreyB
Description:
GreyB loves searching and analysis on patents!

We perform custom research investigations on patents, scientific articles, news and industry trends and integrate the business specific information about markets and your competitors to empower your decisions.

Patents protect your strategy but also make your business vulnerable by giving exposure to what exists in patent landscape and is not owned by you. With this situation, we invest expert human research and analysis in a services model to create filtered reports to help your organization with becoming competitive.

It is to reckon that patent data is the most accurate proxy measure of technological capability and combining patent data with other sources of information will enhance your decision-making. In such ever growing patent data we have challenges of 'wording' across the patent sections. Now in such complex world of patents - we give you the power of human analysis to structure research and filtration.

Add to this that we can capture data, which is in the English, the Chinese, the Japanese and the Korean language. This will result into comprehensive coverage of the data that exists and analysis that is manual and engineered to your needs.

Name: KPMG Sri Lanka
Description:
KPMG is a global organization of independent professional services firms providing Audit, Tax and Advisory services. KPMG is the brand under which the member firms of KPMG International Limited (“KPMG International”) operate and provide professional services. “KPMG” is used to refer to individual member firms within the KPMG organization or to one or more member firms collectively.

KPMG firms operate in 138 countries and territories with more than 275,000 partners and employees working in member firms around the world. Each KPMG firm is a legally distinct and separate entity and describes itself as such. Each KPMG member firm is responsible for its own obligations and liabilities.

KPMG Sri Lanka is one of the largest professional services firms and is also the oldest Chartered Accountancy firm in the country spanning over a century since inception in 1897. The firm presently has a resource base comprising of 19 Partners and over 1200 professionals and associates. The service portfolio of the firm spans across areas such as External Audit Services, Tax Services, Internal Audit and Risk Consultancy Services, Accounting Advisory, IT Advisory, Deal Advisory Services, Management Consultancy Services and HR Advisory Services.

Name: NeuroLeadership Institute
Description:
Our Story:

In 2007, David and Lisa Rock and their team had been working in leadership development and executive coaching for ten years, when David coined the term “NeuroLeadership.” They realized that bringing a more concrete, science-based approach to growing soft skills would not just resonate with business leaders but also make any change initiative more effective.

That same year, what would become the NeuroLeadership Institute ran its first Summit in Asolo, Italy, convening business practitioners and brain scientists. Since then, Summits have been held across London, Sydney, San Francisco, DC and Boston before settling into its home in New York City. Tens of thousands of people now join the summit each year by live streaming.

2008 also saw the launch of the NeuroLeadership Journal.

In its first few years, NLI published the foundational papers in the field, including the first paper on the SCARF  Model. We initially provided executive education, and then soon started to consult with firms based on demand, eventually helping launch a movement to do performance management without formal ratings.

After two and a half years of research, NLI launched the SEEDS Model  in 2015, and a diversity and inclusion (D&I) practice was born. Soon after, NLI launched a culture and leadership practice, initially working with tech giants Intel, Microsoft, and IBM. It also gained deep expertise in growth mindset and helped many organizations transform culture. Around that same time, NLI introduced the distributed learning solution, a socialized learning methodology that allows large groups of people to learn and retain knowledge with little time commitment.

Going into the future, we’re continuing to adapt, evolve, and listen for where people need us next.

Las empresas que encuestamos representan prácticamente todos los tamaños y todas las industrias.

Crear una cultura de alta confianza y alto rendimiento para todos los empleados es un viaje, y GPTW conoce la ruta que deben recorrer todos los tamaños de organizaciones.

Practicamos lo que predicamos en el interior de GPTW. Somos personas con mentalidad empresarial en una empresa impulsada por la misión, y somos un GPTW para nosotros mismos.

Better for business, Better for people, Better for The World.

Name: Sebrae-SP
Description:
O SEBRAE faz parte de um sistema criado em 1972 - Centro Brasileiro de Apoio à Pequena e Média Empresa (CEBRAE) vinculado ao Governo Federal. A partir de 1990, a entidade transformou-se num serviço social autônomo, denominado Serviço Brasileiro de Apoio às Micro e Pequenas Empresas – SEBRAE, criado pela Lei nº 8.029, de 12 de abril de 1990, regulamentada pelo Decreto nº 99.570, de 9 de outubro de 1990, posteriormente, alterada pela Lei nº 8.154, de 28 de dezembro de 1990.

O SEBRAE-SP é uma entidade privada sem fins lucrativos com a missão de promover a competitividade e o desenvolvimento sustentável das micro e pequenas empresas e fomentar o empreendedorismo. 

Tem sua estrutura formada por um conselho administrativo com representantes da iniciativa privada e do setor público, cuja composição visa articular ações que buscam estimular e promover as empresas de micro e pequeno porte com as políticas de desenvolvimento econômico e social.

Constitui-se, portanto, numa instituição que prepara os micro e pequenos empresários para obterem as condições necessárias para crescerem e acompanhar o ritmo de uma economia competitiva. 

ESPECIALIZAÇÕES:
O SEBRAE-SP atua por meio de parcerias com os setores público e privado visando o fortalecimento do empreendedorismo, a aceleração do processo de formalização da economia, a capacitação gerencial, orientação para o acesso ao crédito e à inovação, como também, o estímulo ao associativismo e a promoção de negócios.

Description:
KPMG is a network of professional firms with about 227,000 employees in 146 countries and territories.

In Germany too, KPMG is one of the leading auditing and advisory firms and has around 12,500 employees at 26 locations. Our services are divided into the following functions: Audit, Tax, Consulting and Deal Advisory. 

Our Audit services are focused on the auditing of consolidated and annual financial statements. The Tax function incorporates the tax advisory services provided by KPMG. Our high level of specialist know-how on business, regulatory and transaction-related issues is brought together within our Consulting and
Deal Advisory functions.

We have established teams of interdisciplinary specialists for key industries of the economy.
These pool the experience of our experts around the world and further enhance the quality
of our advisory services.

Name: Assystem Radicon
Description:
Assystem is supporting Saudi Arabia’s switch to low-carbon energy and infrastructure through its Radicon subsidiary. Radicon started out in Saudi Arabia 30 years ago as a local engineering company. It now has offices in Riyadh, Al Khobar and Yanbu.

Assystem Radicon and its 350 Switchers supporting Saudi Arabia’s energy transition by carrying out design studies, site surveys, and construction supervision work. We address a wide range of customers, including public services such as municipalities and ministries, operators, etc.

Assystem is the only company in Saudi Arabia to benefit from the class A environment engineering qualification.

Name: Great Place To Work India
Description:
Great Place To Work is the global authority on building, sustaining and recognizing High-Trust, High-Performance CultureTM at workplaces. We have crafted our perspective by learning from great leaders, surveying millions of employees, and examining thousands of the best workplaces around the globe. We serve businesses, non-profits, and government agencies in more than 60 countries, across all six continents, mission touching more than 10,000 organizations every year. We thrive on sharing the insights we’ve gleaned from our work with companies of all industries and sizes, in order to help organizations around the world, build, sustain and scale their great culture.

Great Place to Work Institute has conducted pioneering research on the characteristics of great workplaces for over 30 years. We believe all organizations can become great workplaces, and our mission is to help them succeed. Great Place to Work Institute partners more than 10,000 organizations every year around the world to help create and sustain a High-Trust, HighPerformance Culture.

Our premiere Best Workplaces Lists are published or distributed by market-leading news media around the world, to an audience of more than 25 million readers. The combination of this direct advisory work and media coverage is all core to how we create a better society by helping companies transform their workplaces by specializing in organizational trust. It is our contribution to a global shift in businesses that are changing the way the world works.

Name: IPE Global Limited
Description:
Headquartered in India with five international offices in Bangladesh, Ethiopia, Kenya, the Philippines, and the United Kingdom, the IPE Global Group offers a range of integrated, innovative, and high-quality consulting services across several sectors and practice areas.
 
As a trusted partner to its clients, IPE Global draws together a diverse talent pool of 1,100+ people, including economists, chartered accountants, sociologists, public sector experts, educationists, urban planners, architects, environmentalists, scientists, and project and programme managers. IPE Global has successfully implemented over than 1,000 projects in over 120+ countries across five continents. The Group partners with multilateral and bilateral agencies, governments, corporates, philanthropic organisations, and not-for-profit entities in anchoring development agenda for sustained and equitable growth.
 
IPE Global draws its consulting capabilities from its offices worldwide to help clients address developmental challenges by adapting and applying solutions to complex socio-economic issues. Each of IPE Global’s group companies operates independently — Triple Line Consulting Limited (a UK-based subsidiary), IPE Global (Africa) Limited (an Africa-based subsidiary), SAMRIDH Impact Solutions Private Limited (a healthcare blended finance facility), and IPE Global Centre for Knowledge and Development (a section 8 company focusing on research and development consultancy).

Name: Global M

Name: Odgers Berndtson
Description:
We are a global executive search, interim management, talent assessment and leadership development firm. We have the scale, reach and experience to serve all major markets but we remain lean, flexible and innovative.

Being a challenger is at the heart of our cultural DNA. We have a track record of anticipating our client's needs and challenging the status quo. We are collaborative experts, located across all major global cities. 

Our clients come from every shape and size of organisation, from start-ups to multinational corporations, and span the private, not-for-profit and public sectors, with expertise in business, government, academic and public life. Many of our clients work with us time and again. All our clients understand the value of finding the right person for the right job at the right time – and in the right way.

Our cultures and Values:
Our culture and values are the key to our success. To maintain our challenger culture, our people are empowered to be curious, creative and agile. We are inclusive and diverse, and we encourage our people to be true to themselves. We are rigorous as well as creative, results-driven, and committed to delivering what we promise.

As well as great people who are trusted and uphold strong values, we utilise industry-leading technology throughout the search process. Our structure rewards teamwork between colleagues, and collaboration with clients and candidates.

Three partnerships mean everything to us – the relationship between our clients, our candidates and our colleagues.

Name: International Standard for Lean Six Sigma (ISLSS)
Description:
The International Standard for Lean Six Sigma (ISLSS) is an internationally focused organization dedicated to bringing customized, value based Lean Six Sigma services and products so that you can focus on what matters most: profitability through competitive advantage, minimizing costs and enhancing quality and efficiency.

We are joining together to network, to learn, to develop business, Jobs, careers, certification opportunities, to participate in best practice sharing, and maintain & build new relationships.

We are a global community, uniting all White Belt (WB), Yellow Belt (YB), Green Belt (GB), Project Managers (PM), Black Belt (BB), Master Back Belt (MBB), Project Sponsor (PS), Deployment Champion (DC), Executive Leader (EL), Kaizen Practitioner or Facilitator or Lean Master, Auditors, Continuous Improvement, Management Consultants, Program Managers, Business Owners, Students, Professors, & Engineers.

We are Lean Six Sigma Professionals, Practitioners, & students of Lean Six Sigma, Lean, Six Sigma, Operational Excellence, TQPI, Business Process Management, business analyst, BPM, Kaizen, TPS, Project Management, Change Management, Strategy, Supply Chain, Innovation, Quality Control, ISO, SCOR, TRIZ, Theory of Constraints, ToC, ITIL, CMMI, Malcolm Baldrige, TQM, Total Quality Management, Industrial Engineers, BPM, & Process Excellence. 

We are a central hub for author’s books, articles, white papers, podcasts, blogs, events and conferences. Consultants, and thought leaders are visiting regularly to support members in projects, productivity, training, skills development, coaching, mentoring, financials, statistical software, simulation, teams, organizational development, and more…. We practice in every Industry and have private subgroups for special topics such as Healthcare, Private Sector, Jobs, BPM, Information Technology, Kaizen, & Operational Excellence

Name: Trabajo Docente
Description:
En Trabajo Docente, somos una consultora especializada en la identificación y selección de los mejores profesionales de la educación para instituciones educativas en Chile. Nuestra pasión por la educación y la convicción de que los docentes son la piedra angular para una sociedad más preparada y consciente, nos impulsa a brindar un servicio excepcional.

Nos dedicamos a encontrar los candidatos ideales para cada institución educativa, comprendiendo a fondo sus necesidades y cultura organizacional. Con nuestra vasta experiencia y conocimiento en el sector, garantizamos la selección de profesionales que no solo cumplen con los requisitos técnicos, sino que también poseen una auténtica vocación por la enseñanza.

Nuestro proceso de selección es riguroso y eficiente, evaluando tanto las competencias y conocimientos del candidato como su compromiso y capacidad para inspirar a los estudiantes. Nos aseguramos de que cada docente seleccionado esté altamente calificado y dispuesto a contribuir al desarrollo académico y personal de sus alumnos.

Además, en Trabajo Docente, ofrecemos soluciones personalizadas para optimizar el proceso de reclutamiento docente. Colaboramos estrechamente con nuestros clientes para asegurar un proceso de selección fluido y exitoso, alineado con sus expectativas y necesidades específicas.

En resumen, estamos comprometidos con la misión de seleccionar a los mejores docentes para construir un futuro educativo brillante en Chile. Si buscas profesionales docentes altamente calificados, contáctanos hoy mismo para comenzar a trabajar juntos.

 Contacto: contacto@trabajodocente.cl
Location: Las Condes, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Description:

Spanish Leadership is a success story founded by Jorge Zuazola in Germany because of Spain´s triumph in Euro 2008. On top of a very successful Corporate Career, Jorge had 2 decades long of Leadership and Network top-notch experience, which he used to launch Spanish Leadership as a build-up to win the South Africa World Cup.  The exponential growth of LinkedIN enabled him to transform his old 1.0 domain of Spanish Leadership in a web 2.0 following the teachings of Darcy DiNucci´s Fragmented Future. Webs 1.0 do not make sense for entrepreneurs. Webs 2.0 with communities do lead business.

Spanish Leadership is an English speaking treble iii (Internet Ideas Incubator) for the 2.0 world. It has to be in English because sadly most of our countrymen and women think that being fluent in English is not a must. They wrongly believe that someone will come to put them a red carpet to become proficient in English.That is why Spanish Leadership´s motto is TEAM which stands for Together Everybody Achieves More`.

Most Spanish people would wrongly say that leadership is vision, courage, credibility, determination or even militarism or politics. At Spanish Leadership we however sincerely believe that leadership is first and foremost about people. It is about leaders releasing people to do what they need to do in the most productive and beneficial way. You cannot call yourself a leader and not have followers.

A leader´s greatest compliment and achievement is his or her followers, and followers will reflect a leader´s positive value and missions.

Success is a decision. You can become the leaders´ leader if you adhere to the principle that the growth and development of people is the highest skill of leadership. We want English proficient native Spanish leaders to surge in the World arena. In the fields of business, sports, research, innovation, entrepreneurialism, and charity amongst others.

info1@spanishleadership.com/jorge.zuazola.consulting.linkedin@gmail.com

Description:

Complexity is rising. Noise is rising with it. Most companies respond with more dashboards, more jargon, and more AI theater. We prefer something that works. We use mathematics, AI, behavioral science, and design to turn complex problems into decision systems leaders can trust.
 
Our teams think in nonlinear ways. They break problems down to first principles. They build models that expose what the business cannot see. The work is analytical, human, and intensely hands-on. The outcome is simple. Better decisions that create measurable advantage.
If you want slogans, look elsewhere. If you want decisions that stand up to reality, welcome to Mu Sigma.

Our firm is known for developing a thorough understanding of the issues that face our clients, relating those issues to relevant economic theory, and then supporting our analysis with solid and persuasive empirical evidence. Our successes in the courtroom and before regulatory agencies over the years have validated our approach.

Compass Lexecon was formed in January 2008 through the combination of Competition Policy Associates (COMPASS) and Lexecon. For the past 18 years, Compass Lexecon has been ranked as one of the leading antitrust economics firms in the world by the Global Competition Review.

Description:

•	Gran Thornton Financial Advisory Services – Advisory
•	Grant Thornton Operations – Outsourcing
•	Grant Thornton Digital - Digital services

Il nostro approccio si basa sull’approfondimento delle esigenze specifiche di ciascun cliente, a cui rispondiamo tempestivamente ed in modo integrato, con un alto livello di competenza. Le nostre caratteristiche distintive sono il lavoro in team, la cura per i dettagli, la cooperazione e l'integrazione tra linee di servizio differenti, per un'assistenza multidisciplinare. Altro elemento fondante è la collaborazione con professionisti appartenenti ad altre member firm del network Grant Thornton. 

Da più di 100 anni, con 80.000 persone in più di 150 Paesi, Grant Thornton aiuta le imprese dinamiche di tutto il mondo nel proprio processo di crescita fornendo soluzioni innovative e pensate su misura per le esigenze di ciascun cliente, a livello sia nazionale sia internazionale. La nostra solida organizzazione, combinando una conoscenza dei mercati locali con quella delle economie globali, ci permette di supportare i nostri clienti, siano essi società private o pubbliche, quotate e non, in qualsiasi mercato decidano di operare.

Name: National Engineering Services Pakistan (pvt.) Ltd
Description:
National Engineering Services Pakistan (NESPAK) is a premier engineering consultancy organization, established in 1973 with the strategic vision of reducing Pakistan’s dependence on foreign consultants and fostering indigenous expertise. As a state-owned yet professionally autonomous entity, NESPAK has grown into one of the most respected names in engineering consultancy across Asia, the Middle East, and Africa. The organization provides end-to-end consultancy solutions encompassing project planning, feasibility studies, design, tender documentation, contract management, construction supervision, and post-project evaluation.

With a multidisciplinary workforce exceeding , NESPAK delivers services across a diverse array of sectors including energy (hydropower, thermal, solar, and wind), water resources development (dams, canals, irrigation systems), transportation infrastructure (roads, bridges, airports, railways), architecture and urban planning, public health engineering, environment and climate resilience, industrial development, and IT-based smart solutions. NESPAK integrates cutting-edge technologies, sustainability principles, and global best practices to engineer projects that are technically robust, economically viable, and socially impactful.

Leveraging decades of institutional experience and a portfolio of over 4,500 successfully completed projects, NESPAK continues to serve as a key partner in national development and international infrastructure advancement, representing the highest standards of quality, integrity, and professional excellence.

Name: Steer
Description:
Complex challenges. Powerful solutions. 

Steer is a global consultancy specialising in the critical services and infrastructure that make our world work. 

Our interdisciplinary teams combine deep industry experience and real-world insights with strategic excellence, commercial acumen, and technical expertise. Leveraging the most advanced technology and data science. 

From mobility to energy and technology to education, we’re trusted to deliver powerful solutions that make a measurable difference – to our clients, the communities we work in and the world we share.

Name: VCloud
Description:
VCloud Interactive: Redefining Contact Center and Communications with AI and Cloud Technology

VCloud Interactive, a subsidiary of VoiceCloud LLC, has been at the forefront of revolutionizing communications for over 20 years. By leveraging cutting-edge AI and 100% cloud-based technology, we empower organizations, including Fortune 100 companies, to automate and optimize mission-critical communications, contact center operations, and business processes.

Our AI-driven platforms are designed to simplify even the most complex telecommunications interactions and workflows, seamlessly integrating human expertise and artificial intelligence. From enhancing efficiency and decision-making to providing exceptional support for internal teams and end-users, our intelligent solutions deliver scalable, transformative results.

We offer a comprehensive suite of advanced services, including AI-enhanced Interactive Voice Response (IVR), intelligent call routing, dynamic contact center solutions, automated messaging, and robust voice communications. Trusted by businesses across diverse industries and global markets—including some of the world’s largest organizations—VCloud Interactive connects people to the information they need—anytime, anywhere—at the most competitive price points in the industry.

Join us in embracing the future of communications. Discover how VCloud Interactive’s innovative solutions can drive unparalleled efficiency and results for your business.

Name: BMC
Description:
BMC is opgericht vanuit de overtuiging dat de bedrijfsvoering binnen de overheid kon worden verbeterd. In 37 jaar is BMC uitgegroeid tot een gerenommeerd adviesbureau en hebben wij samen met onze opdrachtgevers veel bijzondere verbeterpraktijken ontwikkeld.

Wij zijn een betrouwbare partner voor onze opdrachtgevers en hun complexe uitdagingen als gemeenten, provincies, de rijksoverheid, onderwijs- en zorgaanbieders, de corporatiesector, waterschappen en meer. Onze expertise strekt zich uit over de volledige breedte en diepte van de publieke sector. Daarbij onderscheiden wij ons door hoogwaardig advies en onderzoek te koppelen aan implementatie met daadkracht: we maken bedachte oplossingen waar en brengen ons advies in de praktijk. 

De maatschappelijke opgaven zijn complex. De omstandigheden waarin de publieke sector aan deze opgaven werkt, zijn uitdagend en veeleisend. Dit alles is reden genoeg voor BMC om ook de komende jaren actief bij te dragen aan de ‘uitvoeringskracht’ van de publieke sector, de essentiële kwaliteiten waarover publieke organisaties moeten beschikken om uitvoerbaar beleid te maken. Beleid dat leidt tot resultaat voor inwoners, ondernemers, leerlingen en cliënten.

Name: EB1A Experts
Description:
At EB1A Experts, we help tech professionals develop a strong evidence strategy and a clear personal narrative for different kinds of visas, including EB1A, O1A, and EB2-NIW that reflects extraordinary ability.
Many qualified candidates struggle because their achievements are spread across roles, projects, and recognition that are not connected into one cohesive story. We help you identify the most persuasive proof points, organize your supporting materials with intention, and shape a narrative that clearly explains your influence, leadership, and real-world impact.
Our goal is to bring clarity to your journey by turning scattered accomplishments into a structured, credible narrative supported by the right evidence.
Ready to strengthen your immigration narrative with the right evidence strategy? Learn more at https://eb1aexperts.com/
Legal Disclaimer: The information provided by EB1A Experts is for educational and informational purposes only. While we strive to offer valuable insights, as we are not a law firm, we do not provide legal advice or representation before U.S. immigration authorities.

Name: WYG Group
Description:
WYG is an award-winning professional services firm employing over 1,600 people and operating from more than 50 locations across the UK, Europe, Africa, Asia. • WYG Advisory is a proactive management consultancy designed to help identify opportunities for our clients, support their decision-making processes and deliver effective programmes. 
• WYG Consulting assembles specialist teams to offer high value project management and technical services to the markets in which we operate.

WYG is a Tetra Tech-owned company.

Name: GEOS Group
Description:
The GEOS Group was established in 1998 based on the twofold observation of companies’ increased exposure to political, criminal and business risks, and the lack of available resources to protect against these threats, quickly establishing itself as the leading French company in this business sector.

GEOS’s main mission is to allow companies to effectively exploit their full potential for growth and influence without endangering their staff or their tangible and intangible assets.

GEOS acts as a first-choice partner for its clients, allowing them to continue their business activities, wherever risks may emerge, by providing them with solutions for risk management or operational and human resource issues, going beyond typical security matters.

To address the challenges of flexibility and agility in order to meet specific business needs and reduce operational costs while maintaining the quality of the service they provide, GEOS allows you to quickly build a team with the key skills required to successfully complete your projects, giving you the option of outsourcing certain services or managing major projects, anywhere in the world.

Description:
Founded in London in 2010, Transform Partner is a digital transformation advisory now operating from India, helping enterprises, governments, and startups turn strategy into real-world outcomes. Our mission is simple: to deliver measurable impact, accelerated innovation, and transformation that lasts.

We work alongside boards, executives, and leadership teams to:
•	Define digital and data strategies that align with business priorities
•	Build enterprise architecture and AI readiness frameworks
•	Develop new products and innovation programs that scale quickly
•	Foster learning ecosystems and leadership capabilities to sustain change

For corporate teams and government bodies, we run immersive “Knowledge Transfer” workshops and executive coaching in digital transformation, intrapreneurship, product innovation, design thinking, and building innovation culture.

For startups and entrepreneurs across Fintech, Healthcare, AI, IoT, Smart City solutions, HR, and GPS-based applications, we provide end-to-end support — from idea validation to MVP/PoC, go-to-market strategies, and fundraising — helping bridge the gap between innovation and enterprise adoption.

Our work spans Finance & Banking, Manufacturing / Industry 4.0, Insurance, Payments, Retail & E-commerce, Telecom, Smart Cities, Healthcare, Hospitality, EdTech, Fashion, and Technology, with high-impact programs delivered for governments and global enterprises.

Why clients choose Transform Partner:

Name: JSB Solutions
Description:
In JSB Solutions crediamo che l'eccellenza nel settore Life Science nasca dalla capacità di creare un ambiente unico, dove una solida cultura aziendale ispirata da valori etici e di bellezza si traduce in soluzioni innovative che hanno un impatto positivo sulle persone, sulle organizzazioni e sulla società.

Il nostro nome si ispira a Johann Sebastian Bach e alla sua genialità nel trasformare la complessità del contrappunto in opere d'arte accessibili che nutrono l'anima attraverso la perfetta fusione di bellezza, rigore ed eccellenza. È questa stessa ricerca della perfezione attraverso il richiamo a valori solidi che guida il nostro approccio alla consulenza nel settore Life Science.

Il nostro successo viene edificato da relazioni autentiche, da una presenza costante e da contenuti che vengono arricchiti dallo studio continuo. I nostri consulenti combinano una profonda conoscenza tecnica del settore con un approccio fortemente ancorato alla nostra cultura aziendale, permettendoci di essere non semplici fornitori, ma dei veri e propri alleati.

I nostri servizi integrati:
Consulenza Life Science: accompagniamo i clienti attraverso l'intero ciclo di vita del farmaco, offrendo consulenza esperta su produzione, manutenzione, convalida, gestione della qualità, registrazione regolatoria e farmacovigilanza.

Servizi di Ricerca Clinica: come Contract Research Organization (CRO), gestiamo gli studi clinici combinando rigore scientifico ed efficienza operativa. Guidiamo ogni fase dello studio, dalla progettazione del protocollo alla submission regolatoria, garantendo i più alti standard qualitativi.

Soluzioni Digitali: sviluppiamo software innovativi che potenziano la ricerca clinica e ottimizzano la gestione della sicurezza sul lavoro. Le nostre piattaforme, personalizzate e scalabili, evolvono con le esigenze dei clienti integrando le più recenti tecnologie per massimizzare efficienza e compliance.

At Kreativstorm, we take a collaborative and human-centered approach to consulting. Our services include strategic planning, process optimization, change management, and more. We are committed to delivering innovative and results-driven solutions that optimize processes, increase efficiency, and enhance overall performance.

We are dedicated to building long-term relationships with our clients based on mutual respect and trust. Our goal is to empower our clients to become leaders in their respective markets and make a positive impact in the world. We believe that by working together, we can drive positive change and make the world a better place.

Realizamos nuestros procesos con metodologías y herramientas innovadoras, máxima calidad y foco en las personas. Ponemos nuestro máximo foco en considerar la inclusión y la diversidad en todos nuestros procesos.

Nuestro equipo de profesionales cuenta con más de 20 años de experiencia en el sector, lo que ha hecho del conocimiento nuestro principal patrimonio. Además colaboramos con diversas ONGs como UNICEF o Down Madrid, aportando nuestro granito de arena para construir una sociedad mejor.

Nuestro equipo sabe que lo más importante son las personas a las que COMO TÚ orientamos y ayudamos a crecer personal y profesionalmente. Anímate a unirte a nuestro equipo y verás cómo se enriquece tu futuro y desarrollo profesional incrementado con la experiencia de trabajar en equipos multidisciplinares para clientes de primer nivel en diferentes sectores: banca, seguros, telecomunicaciones, utilities o administraciones públicas.

Buscamos gente como tú, con tu experiencia, tus conocimientos y tu motivación para  ofrecerte UNA FORMA DE TRABAJAR DIFERENTE.

Pensamos que no hay nada imposible para el que se atreve. ¿Hablamos?

Name: Alkemy Group
Description:
Alkemy started out in 2012 to support the digital transformation of Italian businesses. 

Listed in Milan’s Stock Exchange since 2017, Alkemy aims at improving the market positioning and competitiveness of large and medium-sized companies by stimulating the evolution of their business model in line with technological innovation and consumer behavior. Alkemy integrates skills in the areas of Consulting, Data & AI, Marketing & Media, Creativity, Production, Design, Customer Engagement & Technology with an offer, designed for the post-digital context, covering the entire value chain from strategy to implementation.

With over 1000 professionals in our offices in Milan, Turin, Rome, Madrid, Belgrade and Mexico City, we strongly believe that the growth of our business is only possible through our people. They are our strength, our heritage and our most important resource as they combine their talent and competence with our guiding values: Excellence, Passion, Integrity and Concreteness.

Since December 2024, the company is subject to management and coordination activity by Retex S.p.A. - Società Benefit owned by Fondo Strategico Italiano. Following the operation completion, alkemy has been delisted from July 2025.

Name: American Leadership
Description:
American Leadership is the third 3i (Internet Ideas Incubator) 3.0 founded by Jorge Zuazola in 2012 after the success of Spanish Leadership (launched in 2008 with a focus on network, leadership, time management and financial education) and German Leadership (launched in 2010 with similar business lines but with a strong time management focus which is a key German skill).  American Leadership focuses on all these lines of business with an emphasis on finance.

The exponential growth of LinkedIN enabled Jorge Zuazola  to transform his old 1.0 domain of Spanish Leadership in a web 2.0 following the teachings of Darcy DiNucciÂ´s Fragmented Future. Webs 1.0 do not make sense for entrepreneurs. Webs 2.0 with communities do lead business. 


Business will change in the next 10 years more than it has in the last 50.Have money working for you instead of you working for money The reason why most people do not get wealthy is because they have never been trained financially to see an opportunity which is right in front of them. Adults who are serious about building long-term investment pipelines need to start managing their money according to a three-jar system to then convert it into gold.

To apply this triangle of success, adults need to come to the realization that neither the primary school nor the university (business schools included) system teaches you how to make money. Those systems will never succeed at teaching you how to make money because they are based on the scholastic system of education which was not designed to teach the fundamentals of finance.

Professionals and companies alike benefit hugely from the system. Concepts such as cash book, income versus fixed and variable costs, budgeting, expenses converted to cost accounting for family units, austerity are indeed a must have for any professional if they are to succeed in an ever changing world.

jorge.zuazola@american-leadership.net/jorge.zuazola.consulting.linkedin@gmail.com

Name: Business Sweden
Description:
We help Swedish companies grow global sales & international companies invest and expand in Sweden. 

For Swedish companies, we provide strategic advice, sales execution and operational support to help them grow their international revenues. They can trust us to shorten time to market, find new revenue streams, and lower risks. We have achieved our expertise by being present in the world's 50 most promising markets for over 40 years, at the scene, helping to close the deal.

For international companies we ensure that they can rely on our knowledge, experience and extensive network to identify new business opportunities and achieve an accelerated return on investment. Once they are settled in Sweden, we make sure they are equipped for a successful long-term presence.

Business Sweden was founded on the first of January, 2013, by a merger of the Swedish Trade Council (Exportrådet) and Invest Sweden. Business Sweden is owned by the Swedish Government and the industry, a partnership that provides access to contacts and networks at all levels.

Name: Freelance.com
Description:
Freelance.com accompagne les grandes organisations dans leur transformation globale (transformation du travail, transformation numérique, transformation environnementale) en les connectant avec les meilleurs experts travaillant en freelance ou dans des PME hyperspécialisées du numérique. 

Nous voulons faire tomber la frontière entre talents internes et talents externes. 
Notre mission est d’initier, d’animer, de simplifier et de sécuriser la relation entre les entreprises et leurs talents externes. 
Notre ambition est de donner à tous les talents le pouvoir d’être des change makers : d’avoir le maximum d’impact dans les structures où ils choisissent de s’investir. 

Avec un CA de 857,7,2 M€ en 2023, une présence en France et à l’international (Suisse, Allemagne, Angleterre, Maroc, Luxembourg,  Singapour) et une communauté de plus de 150 000 consultants et experts, Freelance.com est l’acteur leader en Europe du freelancing et de l’intermédiation entreprise-talents externes.

Name: Silverlight Research Group
Description:
Silverlight Research Group is an Expert Network firm connecting Top Professionals with Senior Industry Experts. Our clients include a number of the world's largest private equity funds, hedge funds, long only funds, consultancies, sovereign wealth funds as well as Fortune 500 corporates

We are a London headquartered firm, and our research and operations team is geographically diversified across EMEA (London, Spain, Egypt), Americas (New York, Colombia), and Asia (Singapore, Pakistan, Philippines). In this way, have a global reach to serve our clients.

If you would like to get in touch regarding using our services as a client please connect with us at www.silverlightgroup.com or call +44(0)208 616 8073

If you would like to enquire about working with us a a client please email client-team@silverlightgroup.com

Silverlight Research has a client referral rate of 65%, 65% of all new clients that work with us are referred by existing clients. With an industry-leading expert acceptance rate of 61% and an engagement success rate of 97%, Silverlight Research has become an expert network of choice for clients globally.

Name: MaRS Discovery District
Description:
MaRS is the world's largest urban innovation hub in Toronto that supports startups in the health, cleantech, fintech, and enterprise sectors.

When MaRS opened in 2005 this concept of urban innovation was an untested theory.

Today, it’s reshaping cities around the world. MaRS has been at the forefront of a wave of change that extends from Melbourne to Amsterdam and runs through San Francisco, London, Medellín, Los Angeles, Paris and New York. These global cities are now striving to create what we have in Toronto: a dense innovation district that co-locates universities, startups, corporates and investors.

In this increasingly competitive landscape, scale matters more than ever – the best talent is attracted to the brightest innovation hotspots.

Name: Open Executive Search & Selection - Milan & London
Description:
Open Executive Search & Selection is an international leader in Human Capital consulting. With our international presence in strategic locations we provide a portfolio of complete HR solutions on a global scale.

We carry out executive search for Italian, European and international clients, recruiting Executives and Senior Management reporting to the Board. 
Our managerial & creative approach, rigorous in applying rules and brilliant in transgressing them, paired with our breadth of Associates enable us to support our clients globally, also benefiting our IRC Global Executive Search Consultants membership.  
Our industry expertise: 
- Consumer
- Financial Services
- Life Sciences 
- Industrials 
- Private Equity
- Services
- Technology

Our functional expertise: Board of Directors, C level, General Management, EVP/SVP/VP functional vertical heads globally in Commercial (Sales/Marketing), Product Supply (Supply, Manufacturing, Strategic Sourcing), Technical/R&D, and Administration (Finance & HR).  We are a point of reference in Executive Search for General Management, Human Resources, Sales, Marketing, Finance and Operations roles.

Description:

As the largest tech training company in the UK and fastest-growing in the US, we provide continuous, engaging, and collaborative learning experiences. Our programs connect learning across silos, ensuring continuity and fostering collaboration.

Name: West Monroe
Description:
West Monroe is a global business and technology consulting firm passionate about creating value for our clients. We co-create solutions that accelerate results now and prepare industries to tackle what’s next. We’re excited by the possibilities that technology creates. We work with our clients to deliver on the possible, building on their goals, generating fresh insights and creating inspiring outcomes.

We excel at the intersection of industry, strategy, people and technology—always driving rapid impact. Our all-in approach comes from our unique employee ownership structure. Our clients’ success is our success. From the beginning, our growth has come from putting people at the center. Fortune and USA Today consistently celebrate West Monroe as a top workplace, and we’re recognized as a leading consultancy by Forbes and Forrester. Share our passion at westmonroe.com.

Description:
Global Disability Inclusion, LLC  is a human resources, management consulting firm specializing in disability employment and inclusion. Our experts work with Global 500 companies, U.S. Federal Contractors, Universities, Foundations, and Non-Profit organizations to design and develop comprehensive disability employment & inclusion strategies and programs. Our approach enables companies to evolve from a compliance-based program to one focused on competitiveness. 

Supporting companies with operations in the Americas, Asia Pacific, Central & Eastern Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, we design world-class programs that effectively balance a strong corporate culture with local customs and legal requirements.

Global Disability Inclusion is 100% women and disability-owned and operated.  We welcome inquiries from all organizations looking to expand their disability programs.  For more information, please visit our website at www.globaldisabilityinclusion.com or contact us at info@globaldisabilityincluision.com .

•	Medical Writing & Scientific Communications
•	Post-Marketing Clinical Studies
•	Staffing (US only)

For more details visit us at www.tech-observer.com

Our involvement is based on deep knowledge and experience, working shoulder-to-shoulder with many different organisations. We do not blindly follow a methodology; we follow through on getting things done.

Description:

Name: BCG GAMMA
Description:
GAMMA - Part of BCG X: Making AI Real for Business

BCG X is a new home for tech-build and design talent to work with the world’s leading organizations and solve their biggest strategy and technology challenges. The new business unit brings together cutting-edge AI, visionary business ventures, and unique software and products in the most strategic industry applications for clients.

At GAMMA, part of BCG X, we believe that competitive advantage exists at the intersection of data science, technology, people, and deep business expertise. 
To unlock true power, AI must be woven into processes and ways of working and applied where it really matters. Our talents as creators, inventors, and builders unlock the art of the possible by crafting and implementing fully customized, end-to-end, advanced analytic and AI solutions.

We build solutions to radically transform the business performance of the world's most iconic companies in nine to twelve months; unleashing the power of large and complex data sets and fostering a culture of innovation and radical change. Our agile, self-funded, and AI-powered solutions ensure continuous improvement for our clients. We focus on enablement from day one, co-creating solutions while building assets and capabilities.
We think big, start small, and scale fast - constructing end-to-end, fit-for-purpose solutions that our clients own and integrate into their unique technology stack with full transparency into components, services, and code.

We are made of a special alloy, the GAMMA alloy: passionate and inventive top-notch data scientists and technologists with sharp business minds.
It’s business with data science and technology built in—an analytics powerhouse with a business backbone. 
Speed, scale, security. Smart. BCG GAMMA.

Name: Modern Workplace Solutions
Description:
Recognizing that we can have exponentially more impact working together, Inclusive Workplaces exists to help evangelize and proliferate action that creates more inclusive, equitable work environments and amplifies the voices of all who share the same commitment.

Inclusive Workplaces is a professional community for thought leaders, business leaders, consultants, practitioners, and service providers working to advance inclusion outcomes in the workplace.

We encourage you to follow us if you are new to the field and want to gain awareness and understanding of inclusive workplace practices.

Our community is also a great place for practitioners who are looking for service and product partners to help them strengthen their inclusive workplace efforts.

You can contribute to the conversation with your comments, reposts, and @mentions.

Beyond following and contributing, becoming a member is an even better way to broaden your awareness and understanding of inclusive practices—or to increase visibility and credibility of the inclusion-related skills, services, and products you offer.

We invite you to join us if you are passionate about building inclusive workplaces, want to have more impact, help evangelize programs and best practices, and share your knowledge and insights.

Better Companies. Brighter World.

Welcome!

Toronto . New York . Houston . Palo Alto

Description:
We are a management and technology consulting firm whose job is to get you where you're going. Driven by our core values: Clients, Culture, and Community; we plot a course that moves us all in the right direction. 

We don’t just say our clients come first, we prove it. We seek. We advise. We solve. When it’s time to build, we’ll bring the blueprints and we roll up our sleeves to go beyond band-aid fixes.

We strive to be the partner that you actually enjoy sitting down with. We work hard to cultivate a team of hard-working advisors who are experts in their field. Their trusted solutions and friendly smiles will make the journey worthwhile.

You’ll still find us lending a hand or sharing a donation, but more than that, we’re invested in the impact that comes after those actions.

Name: Quarry Consulting
Description:
quarry
[ˈkwôrē,]
Noun - “One that is sought or pursued”
Noun – “a place where valuable resources are uncovered and mined”
Verb – “to dig or delve in”

Quarry Consulting (formerly Tiree Consulting) is a technology and advisory services firm based in the Ottawa area and we work with clients and candidates across Canada and the Northern United States. 

Our advisory services help a wide range of organizations successfully implement transformation initiatives with positive impacts on their operations. Digital and IT modernization, risk management, business process redesign, customer & citizen experience (Cx), change management and stakeholder communications are a few of the areas where we help our clients achieve stronger results.

Our staff augmentation services provide high quality and responsive contract staffing, contract-to-hire, permanent placement, managed staffing/service, and payroll solutions. We position experts in three main areas of competency: business services, technology consulting, and IT security.

Quarry Consulting’s skilled and qualified team is comprised of experienced and professional individuals who have built their careers on working with the best resources in the industry.

Name: Prime 8 Consulting
Description:
Some of the biggest names in business trust us to help them adapt to change, transform, and grow in a dynamic, volatile business environment.

From our humble beginnings in 2006 as a small, woman-owned business, Prime 8 has always had a family-first culture that centers on relationships. Here, people matter most – from our seasoned team of passionate consultants to our customers who entrust us with moving their business forward. The exceptional experiences and business outcomes we create earn us die-hard fans, both in and out of Prime 8.  

Prime 8 Consulting professionals go the extra mile to solve our client’s toughest business challenges and create winning solutions that are considered the best in the business by leveraging their deep industry experience and a tested approach for driving fast, measurable results.

Our experts embody our company core values which include:

WE ARE ONE TEAM.
Prime 8 is a family. There is a sense of belonging and a balance for what is good in work and in life. Together, we do better for each other and for our customers.

WE KNOW OUR STUFF.
As a group of high-achievers, we hold each other accountable for exceptional work that is built on integrity, honesty, and excellence. We do what we say and finish what we start.

WE ARE CUSTOMER-OBSESSED.
Our business is built on relationships. We make it a priority to know our customers’ needs and provide solutions that make them successful.

WE ARE SCRAPPY.
Our entrepreneurial spirit keeps us innovative and open to new ideas. We are resourceful and self-driven, motivated to always learn and do better for ourselves and others.

WE LOVE SUCCESS.
At the end of the day, we want to win. If we collaborate, learn, and support one another, our customers, and our community, we all succeed.

Name: Bradford Jacobs
Description:
Bradford Jacobs streamlines business globalisation, offering global consultancy for international growth tailored for small and medium enterprises. Our expertise spans large-scale enterprise solutions, enabling seamless business operations across borders.

We support your business through every stage of international expansion, from rationalising operations to organisational restructuring. By eliminating the complexities of global business, we help you understand new markets, identify opportunities, and attract top international talent while ensuring full compliance, all without needing a local entity.

Our services include:
•	HR Consultancy
•	Employer of Record (EOR)
•	Global Payroll
•	Talent Acquisition
•	Entity Formation
•	Office Space
•	Employee Benefits
•	Salary Banding & Benchmarking

Our solutions will:
•	Increase profitability
•	Enhance flexibility in expansion plans
•	Reduce costs for expansion and employee relocation
•	Minimise employment risks
•	Facilitate entry into new markets
•	Boost organisational efficiency

Bradford Jacobs makes global business simple, providing everything you need to thrive and grow internationally without borders.

With a commitment to excellence and a global network of talent, InTalent Asia is your trusted partner in finding the right professionals who will drive your business forward. Name: Pierian Services
Description:
Founded in 2002, PIERIAN Services is a leading Global Business Services company, providing a range of services and solutions in strategy, consulting, and operations management. Over the past 18 years, Pierian has helped several Fortune 500 companies and new-age start-ups work smarter and achieve accelerated growth through process transformation, digital technology enablement, and creation and management of value-generating business services. 

We help our clients - 
SIMPLIFY – the business processes
ACCELERATE- business insights to make the right decisions
GROW- create future-ready and scalable business

PIERIAN provides a range of Global Business Services through four major service lines- 
1) Managed Services: Digital-Powered Finance and Accounting (FAO), Tax and Compliances, Business Process management (BPM) and Human resource management.
2) Assurance: Statutory audits, reviews, compilations, Employee Benefit plans, Risk / Internal audits, SOX compliance, ICFR/IFC implementation and Go-To market support
3) Strategy and Consulting:  Setting up shared services centers for Finance, HR, Operations and IT functions. Business solutions for process improvement and cost optimization.
4) Digital: Analytics support from data extraction, transformation and analytical visualization. Intelligent automation and ERP implementation.

Our team of 2000-plus skilled professionals delivers exceptional services to more than 250 clients spread across the globe. Pierian has got 11 offices spread across Asia, Middle East and North America.

Together, with our clients, we create powerful experiences that have a profound and lasting impact on businesses and their people. BTS’s areas of expertise include:
• Strategy execution

Name: INNOVATEAM x AWAKE
Description:
AWAKE Group est le groupe lancé par Jean-David Guedj, CEO et fondateur d’Innovateam. Awake Group rassemble d’une part Innovateam, acteur de référence du conseil en ingénierie depuis plus de 20 ans, et Awake, une nouvelle expertise dédiée aux projets à fort impact environnemental et responsables.

Nous sommes un groupe de conseil et d'ingénierie différent par sa vocation : être Acteur de l’Innovation Responsable.

Acteur
Parce que nous allons au-delà du simple conseil : nous sommes partie prenante des projets de nos partenaires industriels dès la conception du produit et travaillons en interaction directe avec leurs équipes.

Innovation
Parce que nous sommes experts en nouvelles technologies et travaillons sur des projets à forte valeur ajoutée, voués à changer l’avenir ; parce que nous sommes aussi l’une des rares sociétés d’ingénierie à posséder notre propre bureau d’études.

Responsable
Parce que nous privilégions les projets porteurs de sens et surcompensons l’empreinte carbone de chacun de nos salariés par la plantation d’arbres.

Nos InnoVActeurs
Ils sont l’élite des ingénieurs, tous issus de grandes écoles et dotés d’expériences professionnelles solides. Ils affûtent en continu leurs compétences techniques au sein de notre bureau d’études.

Ils sont plus que des collaborateurs : ce sont des InnoVActeurs, pleinement impliqués dans la vie de l’entreprise et qui développent leur engagement dans les projets de nos clients comme dans nos programmes internes.

Nos activités s'articulent autour de 5 expertises : 
Mécanique et Physique, Informatique industrielle, Électronique et Systèmes embarqués, Chimie et biologie, Management et Conseil.

Elles s’exercent dans 5 grands secteurs industriels :
Smart Mobility, New Energies & Infrastructures, Healthcare, Connectivity & Data, Defence & Space.

Name: PT. SUCOFINDO
Description:
SUCOFINDO was established in 1956 as a joint venture company between the Government of the Republic of Indonesia and SGS, Geneve, Switzerland.

SUCOFINDO is the first inspection company in Indonesia having business in inspection, testing, certification,
training, and consultancy. Currently, we have more than 2.500 Employee. Domestically, we serve though our branches, services points and laboratories that are widely spread in the country, while in the global market we have partnership with global companies and institutions.

SUCOFINDO’s services have now expanded into Agriculture, Forestry, Marine, Fishery, Livestock, Mining (Oil & Gas), Construction, Manufacturing, Transportation, Information Technology, New and Renewable Energy sectors as well as continuing to develop competencies to support various Government strategic policies.

SUCOFINDO is also the first company to have a commercial laboratory for Coal Bed Methane testing and mineral processing laboratory in Indonesia and the largest in Southeast Asia.

Name: Fiducial
Description:
Fiducial is a major international provider of professional services to small businesses. As a true partner to entrepreneurs and business owners, Fiducial allows them to focus on what they do best: serve their clients. 

Founded in 1970 in France and privately held, Fiducial operates globally from subsidiaries in Europe and in the USA, and through Fiducial International, its worldwide network. 

Fiducial entered the US market in 1999 and expanded operations nationwide through company-owned and franchised offices. The company’s success is the result of a clear focus on professional services for small businesses and individuals, providing them with a one stop shopping experience through 5 major business lines: Business Counseling, Bookkeeping, Payroll, Tax and Financial Management. 

The company is currently initiating a restructuring process to support its ambitious growth objectives: the expansion of the national network through an active strategy of acquisitions, the development of new products/services, and a strengthened management team.

For further information, please visit http//www.fiducial.com

Name: Umbrex
Description:
Umbrex is a global community of independent, top-tier management consultants.
 
Mission
Umbrex was formed to foster camaraderie, collaboration, knowledge-sharing, and professional development among independent management consultants. To accomplish that goal, Umbrex organizes professional development retreats and social events. See upcoming events.
 
Membership
We seek out talented and inspiring colleagues who are excited to contribute to our community.  Membership in Umbrex is highly selective and is based on professional experience, recommendations from clients and peers, and a commitment to the highest standard of client service. The majority of our consultants started their careers at McKinsey, BCG, or Bain. Our members have a proven track record, each with at least two years of independent consulting experience. There is no fee to join Umbrex.
 
Benefits
Umbrex also provides members with shared services including visual graphic production, research and analytics, administrative support, and access to expert networks, including access to a proprietary database of 650,000 US physicians for market research.
 
Contact
Membership inquiries: membership@umbrex.com
Client inquiries: info@umbrex.com

Name: K2 Integrity

At K2 Integrity, we are more than risk managers and compliance experts—we are architects of integrity. We understand that critical moments define an organization’s success. These moments offer an opportunity to achieve higher standards, build smarter systems, enhance financial and structural integrity, and meet public policy challenges with private sector solutions.

Our team—industry experts, former regulators, economic security officials, and auditors—combines deep subject-matter expertise with advanced technology to solve today’s most pressing issues. From financial crime and investment security to construction risk management, internal audit, white-collar investigations, and cyber and AI resilience, we deliver intelligence-driven solutions that foster trust, transparency, and economic security in an increasingly complex world.

Governments, companies, and individuals turn to us when they need a reliable partner to address critical and high-stakes issues, drive efficiency, deliver growth, and enhance competitiveness.

We are committed to helping organizations guard against financial crime and ensure economic security, whether advising on anti-money laundering and counterterrorist financing frameworks or guiding institutions through shifting regulatory landscapes.

From investigating corruption and fraud to preventing the distribution of counterfeit products, our teams use deep, cross-disciplinary expertise and global insights to protect reputations, support decision-making, and uphold public trust.

Whatever the challenge — managing sanctions compliance, supervising a multibillion-dollar construction project, or monitoring the national security implications of a global acquisition — K2 Integrity delivers practical and measurable results. To learn more about K2 Integrity, visit www.k2integrity.com.

Name: NXG Food Safety Works India Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Formerly called “Quality and Food Safety Consultants”, the company was established in the year 2009 to bridge the knowledge gap in the industry about Food Safety Management Systems. This was at a time when FSSAI regulations were still not published, and the concept of HACCP and standards like ISO22000 were recognized only by the export houses.

With the formation of FSSAI in 2006 which lead to notification of FSSAI Rules and Regulations in 2011, the industry has come a long way.  More food establishments are now aware of the hazards of the food industry (next only to pharma) but shortage of expertise continues to exist. We now work with establishments big and small across India and South East Asian countries to help them implement systems and processes for an effective Food Safety Management System.

Over the course of time, we have come to believe that design is an integral part of implementing a good system and this is something that has been completely ignored thus far. To bridge this gap, we now provide services for planning and design of the production unit, be it a factory, a kitchen, cafeteria or a lab. We are able to augment this with a strong regulatory understanding on the product side as well.

We are now a one stop solution for all the industry needs on Food Safety.

Name: Rh Grandes Talentos Consultoria de Recrutamento & Seleção
Description:
A RH GRANDES TALENTOS é um time responsável em recolocação profissional e consultoria de recrutamento e seleção que teve sua primeira semente plantada em 2012, quando nossa fundadora compreendeu que podia ser muito mais que uma headhunter, mas sim uma descobridora de talentos.

Logo no início de sua carreira o desejo de atuar dentro do departamento pessoal da empresa que trabalhava, já falava muito mais alto e com muito trabalho e persistência nossa fundadora galgou uma oportunidade que mudou a trajetória da sua carreira.

A frente do recrutamento e seleção sua experiência, amor e a satisfação de encontrar pessoas certas para atuarem em áreas estratégicas só cresceu e ganhou mais força. Em 2013 com um salto promissor, ocupou uma importante colocação em uma startup.

Sua missão como recrutadora foi encontrar 200 talentos em um prazo de dois anos, esta equipe seria responsável pela grande expansão na qual esta pequena grande startup passaria nos próximos anos. A vivência e experiência absorvida foi de grande valia, as primeiras pétalas do RH GRANDES TALENTOS começara a desabrochar.

Em 2015 o projeto de 200 colaboradores foi alcançado, foram montados grandes times na área de Marketing, Comercial, Administrativo, Financeiro, Tecnologia e Operacional, equipes de alta performance e pluridisciplinar ocupavam posições de muita importância e responsabilidade.

Fazer parte do contentamento das pessoas e da estrutura organizacional foi um motivo de profunda reflexão para um novo salto, só que agora focado no empreendedorismo. Ao assessorar um presidente no recrutamento de perfis de extrema competência, nossa fundadora dedicou-se exclusivamente a prestar consultoria para times que desejam equipes de performance.

No mesmo ano de 2015 a RH GRANDES TALENTOS começou a operar e desde então colabora com profissionais e empresas de inúmeras áreas do conhecimento a se encontrarem, promovendo colaboração, educação corporativa e empreendedorismo.
